title: Sales Development Representative (Setter)
description:
We're a fast-growing US-based financial advisory firm helping business owners take control of their taxes and finances. We're looking for a motivated Appointment Setter to join our team — someone who's comfortable on the phone, professional, and driven to keep our senior advisors' calendars full of qualified prospects.

This is not a closing role. Your job is to start conversations, qualify interest, and book discovery calls for our senior advisory team.

What You'll Do



Work through our CRM to identify and prioritize outreach targets

Call and text US-based prospects to introduce our firm and schedule discovery calls

Send follow-up
s and messages to prospects who haven't responded

Keep CRM records clean — logging call notes, updating lead status, tracking follow-ups

Assist with outbound outreach sequences across phone,
, and SMS

Coordinate scheduling between prospects and our senior advisor



Who You Are



Confident and polished on the phone — cold outreach doesn't intimidate you

Neutral or American-sounding accent — you will be speaking directly with US business owners daily

Excellent spoken and written English

Organized and detail-oriented with strong follow-through

Comfortable working independently and owning your pipeline

Prior CRM or appointment setting experience is a plus

Background in financial services or B2B sales is a bonus — accounting knowledge is not required



Compensation



Base pay + performance bonus per qualified appointment booked

Competitive pay based on experience



To Apply

Submit your resume and a brief voice recording introducing yourself. Prior appointment setting or outbound calling experience is a big plus — tell us about it.

title: SHORT FORM VIDEO EDITOR | Flexible Work Schedule
description:
We’re hiring someone who knows how to turn long-form content into sharp, high-retention short videos for platforms like TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.



This role is for someone who understands pacing, hooks, and visual rhythm in short-form content, and knows how to edit with intention rather than just cutting clips.



—-----------------------------------------------------------------------------



READ THE ENTIRE JOB LISTING CAREFULLY. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



--- ABOUT THE TEAM ---

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM!   





Our Core Values:

1) DELIGHT THE CLIENT:  We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

2) MASTER YOUR CRAFT:  We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.

3) FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS:  When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.



Our core values are important and the right candidate will share our values. We are building an awesome place to work, not just cutting together videos for our real estate business.



--- ABOUT YOU ---

Do you have strong creative instincts and know how to spot 
nts that make people stop scrolling? Are you proactive, adaptable, and detail-oriented? Do you have a sharp sense of pacing, an instinct for hooks, and a clear understanding of how short-form videos need to flow to hold attention? Do you take pride in clean edits and delivering videos that feel intentional and finished? Do our core values sound like a fit for who you are?



Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!



Responsibilities:

Short-Form Editing & Story Selection

- Review long-form videos, transcripts, or raw footage to identify short-form clip opportunities

- Select 
nts that are clear, engaging, and platform-appropriate

- Edit vertical videos optimized for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

- Create strong hooks, clean cuts, and natural pacing

- Deliver publish-ready videos that meet brand and platform standards



Captions, Visuals & Formatting

- Add on-screen captions (burned-in or SRT as required) with proper timing and readability

- Apply basic motion, zooms, punch-ins, and visual emphasis where appropriate

- Follow platform-specific formatting (aspect ratio, duration, safe margins)



Iteration & Workflow

- Implement feedback efficiently and meet agreed turnaround times

- Maintain clear file naming and folder organization

- Track edits, revisions, and delivery status as required



Requirements:

- A STABLE, HIGH-SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION, REQUIRED (at least 150mbps)

- Experience with Final Cut Pro X (or other editing software, such as Adobe After Effects and Premiere Pro) is required

- Strong preference for MacOS users

- Experience editing short-form vertical content for social platforms, required

- Strong understanding of short-form pacing, hooks, and retention

- Experience working from transcripts or long-form content, required

- Clean file organization and understanding of post-production workflo

- Portfolio of completed short-form video projects, required

- General understanding of brand, content marketing, YouTube, etc, required

- GREAT interpersonal and communication skills, required

- Ability to self-start, work on a tight schedule, and manage multiple project deadlines, required

- Ability to follow directions and a LOVE of completing lots of projects according to consistent specifications, required

- Growth mindset, required



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---

STEP 1:

Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.


 



STEP 2:

Qualified candidates may be invited to participate in two PAID test projects, $10-20 USD for each test project estimated to be 2-3hrs of work for each (a total of $40 USD!).



STEP 3:

Candidates who advance through the test project rounds will be invited to an interview.



STEP 4:

Before extending a trial offer, we will conduct a CHARACTER REFERENCE CHECK for the final candidate(s). CONDUCTING A REFERENCE CHECK will be the last step in the hiring process.



STEP 5:

Upon receiving a trial offer, you will be onboarded as a Video Editor with a 90-day PAID trial period. During this period, we expect you to demonstrate your video editing expertise, meet project deadlines, be a team player, and excel at what you do. A successful trial will lead to a permanent offer to join the team.

1) DELIGHT THE CLIENT:  We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

2) MASTER YOUR CRAFT:  We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.

3) FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS:  When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.



Our core values are important, and the right candidate will share our values. We are building an awesome place to work, not just managing marketing campaigns for our real estate business.



--- ABOUT YOU ---

Do you have real estate design experience and understand what makes listings visually credible and market-ready? Do you know how to design social posts and brochures that look clean, professional, and on-brand without overcomplicating them? Do you move fast when timelines are tight and still pay attention to spacing, alignment, and small details?



Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!



Responsibilities:

Social & Digital Design

- Design YouTube branding assets including thumbnails, banners, and episode graphics.

- Create Instagram listing posts, announcements, ads, and story graphics.

- Develop and maintain branded social templates for consistent output.



Print Design

- Design real estate yard signs and signage.

- Create listing brochures and marketing flyers.

- Prepare clean, print-ready files with correct sizing and bleed settings.



Real Estate Photo Editing

- Edit listing photos for lighting, color correction, and clarity.

- Clean up images by removing distractions and enhancing presentation.

- Ensure final images look professional while remaining realistic.



Brand Consistency & Organization

- Maintain consistent fonts, colors, and layout standards

- Ensure all visuals align with company branding

- Organize design files clearly for future use



Requirements:

- Proven experience in real estate graphic design, required

- Strong portfolio showing real estate social and print work, required

- Experience with Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, Lightroom), or similar tools

- Strong understanding of layout, spacing, and visual hierarchy

- Experience preparing print-ready files

- Experience editing real estate photos

- Ability to work quickly without sacrificing quality

- Strong communication skills

- Ability to follow brand guidelines

- A stable, high-speed internet connection

- Growth mindset



BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED)

- Light motion graphics

- Understanding of social media performance metrics

- Basic copy awareness (headline spacing, readability, CTA placement)



NOTE: This is a project-based role with the opportunity to grow into a full-time position for the right person.



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---

STEP 1:

Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.







STEP 2:

Qualified candidates may be invited to participate in two PAID test projects, $10-20 USD for each test project estimated to be 2-3hrs of work for each (a total of $20-40 USD!).



STEP 3:

Candidates who advance through the test project rounds will be invited to an interview.



STEP 4:

Before extending a trial offer, we will conduct a CHARACTER REFERENCE CHECK for the final candidate(s). CONDUCTING A REFERENCE CHECK will be the last step in the hiring process.



STEP 5:

Upon receiving a trial offer, you will be onboarded as a Graphic Designer with a 90-day PAID trial period. During this period, we expect you to demonstrate your editing expertise, meet project deadlines, be a team player, and excel at what you do. A successful trial will lead to a permanent offer to join the team.

title: Finance & Revenue Operations Coordinator (AR & AP)
description:
About the Company

Leverage Live Local (LLL) is a US-based compliance consulting firm -- the #1 preparer of Multifamily Middle Market (MMM) tax exemption applications in Florida under the Live Local Act. We manage compliance for 70+ properties representing over 20,000 units. Our team is remote-first with staff in the Philippines, Spain, and Brazil.



About the Role

We are hiring a Finance & Revenue Operations Coordinator to own our day-to-day money movement -- client invoicing and collections (AR) and vendor bills and payments (AP). This is not a data entry role. You will run our billing systems, keep AR and AP clean, and make sure cash moves on time, every time.



What You Will Own



AR (Accounts Receivable):

- Send client invoices on schedule according to our billing calendar

- Monitor who has paid, who is late, and what follow-up step they are on

- Follow up with late accounts using our AI collections agent (Klaus) and
 templates

- Escalate overdue accounts to management when required

- Maintain clean AR records in QuickBooks and HubSpot



AP (Accounts Payable):

- Capture all vendor invoices as they arrive (via dedicated AP inbox)

- Log every bill into our AP ledger: vendor, amount, due date, terms

- Prepare weekly payment runs for approval

-
 vendors for statements and reconcile discrepancies

- Ensure no service interruptions due to missed payments



Reporting:

- Produce a simple weekly cash report: AR aging, AP due, cash in bank, upcoming major payments

- Flag anything that needs management attention before it becomes a problem

- Improve our processes over time and document SOPs



What Success Looks Like in Your First 90 Days

- 100% of client invoices sent on schedule

- 85%+ of AR current within 30 days

- 100% of vendor invoices logged within 2 business days of receipt

- All critical vendors paid within agreed terms, zero service interruptions



Requirements

- 3+ years experience in accounting, AR/AP, or billing for US, UK, or Australian clients

- Strong experience with QuickBooks or Xero

- Excellent written English -- you will communicate directly with US-based clients and vendors by

- High attention to detail; loves checklists and reconciliations; hates loose ends

- Comfortable working US Eastern hours overlap (at least 4 hours per day, ideally 8am-12pm ET)



Nice to Have

- Experience with HubSpot or other CRMs

- Comfort with AI tools, Zapier, or automation workflows

- Background in professional services, real estate, or property management clients



How to Apply

Send your CV and answer the following questions:

1. Describe your experience with AR and AP for international (US/UK/AU) clients. What was your specific role and what did you personally own?

2. How do you currently track all invoices and due dates? What tools or systems do you use?

3. Attach or describe a simple report you have built to summarize AR and AP status for management.

title: SEO Implementation Specialist
description:

title: Fashion Content Creator & Social Media Manager (Reels + Static)
description:
The ideal candidate has a strong understanding of fashion trends, thrift culture, and visual storytelling, and is confident directing how content should be filmed to perform well on Instagram.



About the Brand



Shop Penny Lane is a curated vintage and preloved fashion brand focused on giving beautiful pieces a second life through pop-up events and online sales.



We’re looking for a fashion-first Social Media Manager and Content Creator who understands trends, styling, and visual storytelling, and can help bring the Penny Lane brand to life online.



This role is ideal for someone who lives and breathes fashion content, understands how social media trends evolve, and can transform raw content into polished posts that drive engagement.



Responsibilities

• Managing and maintaining the Instagram presence for Penny Lane

• Editing and producing Reels and short-form video content

• Creating static posts, graphics and carousel content

• Advising on how content should be filmed to align with current trends and platform performance

• Staying across new social media formats and trends (Reels styles, iOS filming formats, editing styles etc.)

• Preparing clean product images and visuals for website listings

• Writing short captions and selecting relevant hashtags

• Helping maintain a consistent brand aesthetic and tone



Content Creation Workflow

Content will primarily be created from raw footage and images provided by the founder.



Your role will be to:

• Select and edit clips into engaging content

• Structure Reels and posts that align with current social media trends

• Create polished visuals ready for both Instagram and website use



The goal is to transform raw content into engaging, on-brand posts that feel current and aligned with fashion trends.



Content Focus



Content will include:



• Vintage and preloved fashion pieces

• Outfit styling and lookbooks

• Thrift finds and new arrivals

• Behind-the-scenes brand content

• Pop-up events and brand storytelling

• Product content for online listings



What We’re Looking For

You:

• Have a strong interest in fashion and styling

• Understand Instagram trends and short-form video content

• Have experience editing Reels and short-form content

• Have a good eye for visual aesthetics and fashion imagery

• Can maintain a consistent brand style and visual identity

• Are proactive with content ideas and creative direction



Expected Weekly Deliverables



• 3 Reels per week (Monday, Wednesday, Friday)

• 1–2 static posts per week

• Supporting captions and relevant hashtags for each post



Content will be created from footage and images supplied by the founder, with the Social Media Manager responsible for editing, formatting, and preparing the final content for posting.

title: Shopify Brand Designer & Website Optimisation Specialist
description:
Overview



We are looking for a Shopify brand designer and eCommerce optimisation specialist to help refine the visual identity and complete the setup of our Shopify store for Shop Penny Lane, a curated preloved fashion and lifestyle brand.



The logo has already been created, however the overall brand identity, visual styling, and website design still need to be developed and implemented.



This role requires someone who can translate the existing logo into a full brand experience and build a polished Shopify storefront that is optimised for product discovery, Instagram shopping, and conversions.



Key Responsibilities

Brand Identity Development



Using the existing logo as the foundation, develop the visual brand system including:



• Colour palette

• Typography selection

• Brand styling and layout rules

• Website visual aesthetic

• Banner and section styling

• Iconography and supporting design elements



The goal is to create a cohesive and recognisable brand experience across the website.



Shopify Website Design & Layout



Design and optimise the Shopify storefront including:



• Homepage layout

• Collection pages

• Product pages

• Navigation and menus

• Mobile design optimisation



The site should feel clean, fashion-forward, and easy to shop.



Product Page & Collection Optimisation



• Develop consistent product listing templates

• Ensure images, descriptions and sizing information display clearly

• Optimise product pages for sales conversion

• Improve product browsing experience



Instagram Shopping Integration



• Connect Shopify store to Instagram Shop / Meta Commerce Manager

• Ensure products sync correctly

• Configure product collections for Instagram

• Troubleshoot any catalogue issues



Conversion & User Experience Optimisation



• Improve site navigation and shopping flow

• Ensure a seamless checkout experience

• Implement best practices for eCommerce conversion



Ideal Candidate



We are looking for someone who:



• Has strong Shopify design and store optimisation experience

• Has branding and visual identity design capability

• Understands fashion or lifestyle eCommerce brands

• Has experience with Instagram Shop integration

• Has a strong design eye and understands modern online retail aesthetics



Deliverables



• Full visual brand styling based on existing logo

• Fully designed Shopify storefront

• Optimised product and collection pages

• Instagram Shop integration

• Mobile-optimised website design

• Conversion-friendly site layout



Project Outcome



A fully branded, polished Shopify store ready for launch and connected to Instagram shopping, designed to showcase the Shop Penny Lane brand and drive product sales.

title: Etsy Graphic Designer
description:

What you’ll do

but Photoshop must be your main strength.



Requirements

 • Proven Etsy experience (designing for Etsy shops or POD stores).

How to apply

Abhimanyu

title: Notion Systems Architect - Build and Automations
description:
Luxure Lifestyle



Luxure Lifestyle is a high-touch lifestyle and executive support brand entering a structural growth phase. We are building long-term operational infrastructure designed to protect executive focus and support scale.



We are hiring a Systems Architect to architect and personally build our founder-first operating system from the ground up.



This is not an automation oversight role.

This is not a strategy-only position.



This is hands-on architectural infrastructure leadership.



You will design and directly configure the centralized system that governs execution, reporting, initiative visibility, performance tracking, and approval control across the organization. This includes personally building the relational databases, permissions, automations, dashboards, and governance safeguards required for scale.



The mandate is to reduce executive cognitive load without compromising structural integrity or oversight.



If you think in systems — and you build them yourself — continue reading.

What You Will Build



You will architect and deploy:



Founder Operating System (Notion-Based Core)



A relational database ecosystem (Tasks, Meetings, KPIs, Hiring, Initiatives, SOP Library)



Clean schema logic with structured permissions



Interconnected data architecture that eliminates workflow fragmentation



A system designed to remain stable under scale



Controlled Intake & Routing Infrastructure



Centralized intake across Gmail, Slack, and meeting outputs



Structured review pipelines with clear approval gating



Deduplication safeguards and escalation controls



Automation frameworks that support oversight — never bypass it



Executive Visibility & Performance Systems



Real-time KPI dashboards tied to measurable outcomes



Initiative tracking linked to strategic priorities



Structured reporting views that eliminate manual status chasing



Automation monitoring logs with audit visibility



Governance & Documentation



Defined decision pathways and escalation logic



System documentation built for non-technical adoption



Infrastructure that is usable, enforceable, and resilient



This role requires architectural thinking, not tool familiarity.





ENGAGEMENT STRUCTURE



This begins with a 90-day observation and build period.



Within this timeframe, you will be expected to deliver full operating system deployment and conduct an executive walkthrough. Continued long-term engagement will be based on system integrity, clarity, and alignment.





This Role Is Not For You If



You primarily build one-off automations



You require constant direction to design structure



You optimize tools without understanding governance



You focus on speed over architectural durability





This Role Is For You If



You have 3–5+ years advanced experience with Zapier or Make



You have deep Notion relational database architecture expertise



You have built executive dashboards and KPI frameworks



You think in systems, dependencies, and structural integrity



You design for scale, not short-term convenience



You are comfortable operating within executive governance structures





Application Requirements (Required)



A link to your resume



A video recording (maximum 3 minutes) answering:



Describe a full operating system you architected (not just automations). What structural problem did it solve?



How do you document systems so non-technical teams can execute confidently?



Why do you want to build infrastructure for Luxure Lifestyle?



Applications without both submissions will not be reviewed.

title: Virtual Receptionist VA (Remote) | Fast Hiring – 24-Hour Review
description:
Important: Our application process moves quickly. If you are selected to proceed to the next interview stages, you must be able to respond promptly. Candidates who do not respond in a timely manner may be passed over.



We are currently seeking a Remote Spa Receptionist to manage inbound calls and book spa appointments. This is a long-term, performance-based position. Calls are recorded and reviewed regularly. Continued placement in this role depends on accuracy, professionalism, booking success, reliable attendance, no missed calls during scheduled shifts, quick response times, and the ability to professionally manage complaints and de-escalate dissatisfied clients.



To apply: Please copy the questions below, paste them into your reply, and answer each question thoroughly.



(1) Location & Utilities: Where in the Philippines are you currently located? How often have you experienced power or internet outages in the past year? Do you have backup solutions (e.g., generator, mobile hotspot) to ensure your work is not affected?



(2) Home Setup: Will you be working from home? Is your workspace quiet and suitable for handling calls? Do you have your own computer or laptop? Please attach a screenshot of your current internet speed.



(3) Availability & Speed: Can you consistently work seven days a week, six hours per day, and remain available for the full shift without missed calls? How quickly do you typically answer inbound calls? What is your current typing speed in words per minute?



(4) Call & Complaint Experience: Describe your experience with answering inbound calls, booking or scheduling appointments, customer service, following scripts, and handling complaints. Provide one real example of how you de-escalated an upset client and the outcome.



(5) Tools & Systems: What programs, tools, phone systems, or VoIP platforms have you used for handling calls? Do you have any issues with background noise, power outages, or internet interruptions? How do you take notes and log client interactions during calls?



(6) Voice Recordings: Please submit two short voice recordings. Recording one should demonstrate booking an appointment from 7:00 PM to 8:00 PM with a total amount of $60. Recording two should demonstrate handling a double charge for a 90-minute massage where the client sees two $90 charges and is requesting a refund. Your tone should be calm, polite, and professional.



(7) Current Job: Do you currently have another job? If yes, where, how many hours per week, and what are your roles and tasks in that job?



(8) Schedule, Pay & Start Date: Are you able to work seven days a week, six hours per day, during Central Standard Time (CST) hours without conflicts? What is your expected hourly or monthly rate? What is your earliest physical start date if hired?



(9) Marketing, Design & Video: Do you have experience with online marketing, creating content using Canva, or producing short video clips such as
 Reels or similar platforms? Please describe your skills and provide samples of your previous work if available.



(10) Fit, Skills & Experience: Briefly introduce yourself and explain why you would be a good fit for this role. Include what you believe is most important when handling spa clients over the phone, especially during complaints, and what other skills or areas you have a lot of experience in.

description:

For ROI Intelligence & Resi Inspections (Australia)

We are looking for someone who can take full ownership of our social media, content pipeline and brand positioning.

If you are someone who waits to be told what to post — this role is not for you.

International speaking footage

The Type of Person We Want

You:

Have proven experience growing business or personal brands

Think strategically, not just task-by-task

Understand authority positioning

Can identify strong branding opportunities

Are confident making suggestions

Work independently

Have excellent written English

Are organised and systems-focused



If you describe yourself as “just a VA” this role is not for you.



KPIs

Consistent posting across all platforms

Measurable growth in followers and engagement

Regular repurposing of existing assets

Strategic use of high-level associations

Clear reporting on growth and strategy



To Apply (IMPORTANT)



To be considered, you must:

Start your application with the words: “Authority First”

Send a 2–3 minute video explaining how you would use:

International speaking footage

Celebrity photos

Podcast interviews

Endorsements

Provide examples of brands you have helped grow and what results you achieved



Please include your expected full-time monthly salary in your application.

The successful applicant will be paid twice monthly (on the 5th and 20th).



Applications without these will not be considered.



We are looking for a long-term team member who wants to grow with us.

If you are proactive, strategic and excited by building authority brands — we want to hear from you.

title: UGC Video Creator for AI SaaS Brand
description:
Job Title

UGC Video Creator for AI SaaS Brand



About Us

We’re Atmanity, a real-time AI avatar platform that helps creators and brands deploy lifelike, conversational AI versions of themselves for customer engagement, support, and content.

We focus on live, interactive AI avatars (not static generated videos), and we’re looking for creators who understand this new style of content.



Role Overview

We’re hiring UGC creators to produce short vertical videos promoting our AI avatar product.

You will not be the “end-user” in the story; instead, you’ll script and produce UGC-style videos that show how other creators or SaaS companies might use AI avatars.



For this round, we will select 10 creators for a paid trial project. If it goes well, we’re open to ongoing, regular-paid work with the best creator.



Trial Project & Pay

Trial project: 3 short vertical videos (15–45 seconds each)

Pay: $50 total for 3 videos (paid after final delivery)



Format: TikTok / Reels / Shorts style, AI (or real) UGC style video

Deadline: 5 days after you receive the brief and access to our product/demo



What You’ll Be Creating

UGC-style videos that feel native to TikTok/IG/YouTube Shorts



Content that showcases:

How a creator or SaaS founder might use a real-time AI avatar

Benefits like 24/7 presence, live conversations, and customer support use cases

Simple, clear messaging; minimal jargon



Example angles (you can pitch your own concepts too):

“How I cloned myself as an AI avatar to talk to my audience 24/7.”

“If you run a SaaS, here’s how an AI avatar can demo your product even when you’re asleep.”



Hard Skills (Must Have)

Please only apply if you meet these:

Strong UGC portfolio with short form video (TikTok / Reels / Shorts)

Experience working with SaaS brands OR explainer/testimonial content for software tools

Comfortable scripting and planning hooks, CTAs, and story flow (not just editing)

Can film or produce videos in vertical format with clear audio and stable framing

Can keep AI generated character consistent throughout video

Basic editing in CapCut, VN, Premiere, or similar



Priority Skills (Nice to Have – Big Plus)

We will prioritize applicants who:

Have examples of AI related UGC (AI tools, AI avatars, AI content platforms, etc.)

Have already created “UGC style” content where you show / narrate how an AI tool works

Have an AI UGC social media account on TikTok or IG

Are comfortable prompting AI tools (e.g., for avatars, B-roll, or on-screen elements)

Understand SaaS funnels (lead gen, onboarding, demos, customer support)

If you’ve created UGC-style videos for tools like HIggsfield, HeyGen, Synthesia, or other AI video products, that’s a big advantage.



Soft Skills (How You Work)

Communicate clearly in written and spoken English

Reliable with deadlines and open to feedback

Can follow a brief but also propose your own ideas and angles

Comfortable working async with a small startup team



What We Provide

Clear creative brief with suggested hooks, angles, and key messages

Product access or demo assets so you can show the AI avatar experience

Quick feedback loops so you’re not stuck guessing what we want



How to Apply (Please Follow Exactly)

To help us filter serious candidates, please send the following in your application:



Subject line:

Application – UGC AI Video Creator – [Your Name]



Portfolio links (non negotiable):



3–5 links to your best UGC-style videos (TikTok / Reels / Shorts, etc.)

At least 1 example working with a SaaS or software product (if you have it)



Any examples of AI-related UGC (if you have them)



Short answers (you can write 1–3 sentences each):

1. What’s your experience creating UGC for SaaS or B2B products?

2. Have you created content for AI tools before? If yes, which ones?

3. What’s your typical turnaround time for 3 short videos?



Tech setup:

1. What do you use to film or create content (phone model / camera)?

2. What editing tools do you use?



Rate confirmation:

Confirm you’re happy with $50 for the 3 video paid trial and that you’re available to start within the next 7 days.

title: Content Marketing + Customer Support
description:
We are mission-driven children’s brand. This role supports our organic growth by executing SEO + blog content, tracking keyword and content performance weekly, improving landing pages for conversion, and publishing transactional/inventory-driven updates (IG Stories + Shopify
s) through beautiful graphic design. You’ll also provide scheduled customer service backup 1–2 days/week using templates.



We’re looking for someone who is creative and performance-driven: a strong writer with strong Canva skills, who understands AIEO (AI search optimization), funnels, and conversion—then turns insights into clear improvements.



Core Responsibilities

1) SEO + AIEO Blog Content (Primary)

* Write and publish 1–2 SEO-optimized blog posts per week (occasionally 3 during peak seasons).

* Use keyword research (ex: Ubersuggest) to select topics aligned with search intent and purchase intent.

* Optimize content for modern discovery and AIEO:

    * Clear structure, concise answers, strong headings

    * Snippet-friendly formatting and FAQ sections

    * Helpful, culturally respectful explanations for parents and educators

* Ensure every post includes:

    * Internal links to relevant product/collection pages

    * Strong CTAs that move readers into the funnel

    * Optimized meta title/meta description and alt text

* Refresh older posts monthly (update, expand, improve internal links, strengthen conversion paths).



2) Weekly Tracking: Keywords + Content Performance

* Track priority keywords weekly and report movement + actions being taken.

* Monitor performance using Google Analytics (GA4) and, when available, Google Search Console:

    * Organic sessions, landing page performance, bounce rate, time on page

    * Queries/pages with high impressions but low clicks (CTR opportunity)

    * Posts that rank but don’t convert (CTA and funnel fixes)

* Maintain a simple tracking sheet (keywords, URLs, rankings, insights, next steps).



3) Funnels, Conversions, and Landing Page Improvements

* Improve the content funnel from blog ? collection/product pages ? checkout:

    * CTAs, internal linking, recommended products, clarity improvements

* Support ongoing landing page improvements:

    * Rewrite sections for clarity and conversion

    * Add FAQ blocks, trust signals, comparisons, and “what’s included” sections

    * Improve structure for mobile readability

* Create simple on-site resources that increase conversion (ex: guides, checklists, printables).



4) Shopify + Bloggle + Shopify
s

* Publish blogs using Bloggle + Shopify, ensuring correct formatting, SEO fields, and internal linking.

* Create and publish Shopify
s as assigned (announcements, banners, on-site clarity messaging).



5) Canva (Strong Skills Required)

* Create polished Canva assets aligned with brand templates:

    * Blog feature images, IG story slides, simple website graphics, printables

* Maintain a clean Canva file system (naming conventions, folders, reusable templates).



6) Instagram Stories + Transactional Organic Updates

* Publish inventory/transactional updates using templates:

    * Low stock / last chance

    * Back in stock / restocks

    * Surveys, quick announcements, seasonal reminders

* Keep Stories active using interactive formats (polls, questions, stickers).

* Repurpose blog/campaign content into Stories and simple posts.



7) ManyChat Support (Bonus / Support)

* Support ManyChat flows as assigned (basic updates, keyword triggers, link checks, quick edits).

* Coordinate with the team to ensure ManyChat messages match current promotions and inventory availability.



8) Customer Service Cross-Support (1–2 Days/Week)

* Provide customer service coverage 1–2 scheduled days per week, primarily for:

    * Order status + shipping questions

    * Product questions

    * Basic troubleshooting (discount codes, checkout issues)

* Respond using saved templates/macros and escalate exceptions as needed.

* Flag repeated questions so we can improve FAQs, product pages, and automated replies.

* Availability 10-2PM Eastern Standard Time 



Tools You’ll Use (Required)

* Shopify (blogs, pages, content updates)

* Bloggle

* Ubersuggest

* Google Analytics (GA4)

* Google Search Console (if available)

* Canva (advanced)

* ClickUp (tasks, SOPs, approvals)

* ManyChat (support level)



Bonus Skills (Nice to Have)

* Basic Shopify “developer-minded” skills (comfortable reviewing issues and coordinating fixes)

* Ability to review Hotjar / Microsoft Clarity recordings and identify conversion blockers

* Suggest and implement fixes such as:

    * Copy clarity improvements

    * Mobile layout and hierarchy suggestions

    * CTA placement improvements

    * Form friction reduction

    * Navigation and scroll behavior improvements

* Familiarity with Klaviyo (repurposing content, basic QA, campaign support)

* Experience with A/B testing or conversion testing tools

* Ability to create simple printables/resources that support education + conversion

* Help edit videos for social media 



Success Criteria (KPIs)

* SEO/AIEO output: 1–2 SEO blog posts/week with strong structure + internal links

* Tracking cadence: weekly keyword + content performance reporting with actions taken

* Organic growth: organic sessions trend upward vs monthly targets

* Conversion improvements: measurable lifts on priority landing pages (CTR, add-to-cart, conversion rate where possible)

* Instagram: consistent Stories + timely inventory updates; track traffic contribution

* Customer support: 1–2 coverage days/week completed; recurring FAQs surfaced weekly



Requirements

* Strong English writing skills + ability to match a warm, parent-friendly brand voice

* Strong Canva skills (you can produce clean, polished assets quickly)

* SEO fundamentals + AIEO understanding

* Conversion and funnel understanding (content > landing > checkout)

* Organized, consistent, and comfortable working from SOPs/templates



To apply please include:

* A short note about your SEO + conversion experience

* 2–3 writing samples (blog links preferred)

* Resume outlining your experience

* A Canva portfolio link or 3–5 examples

* Confirmation of availability 10-2pm (EST)

* Short & long-term goals

title: B2B Sales & Outreach Specialist – Retail Partnerships
description:
About the Role

We are a growing consumer product brand expanding our wholesale and retail partnerships. We are looking for a sales-focused outreach specialist who can help us identify potential retail partners, build relationships, and develop new wholesale opportunities.

This role is ideal for someone who enjoys B2B sales, outreach, and relationship building, and who is comfortable managing leads and opportunities in a CRM system.

You will play an important role in helping our products reach more retailers and customers worldwide.



What You’ll Do

Sales & Outreach

• Identify and research potential retail partners and specialty stores?• Conduct outreach via
, LinkedIn, and occasional outbound calls?• Follow up consistently with leads and prospects?• Build and maintain relationships with retail partners?• Help open and develop new wholesale accounts

Lead Generation

• Research qualified retailers and organizations that align with our products?• Maintain outreach lists and track engagement?• Support both inbound inquiries and outbound prospecting

Pipeline & CRM Management

• Track leads, partners, and opportunities in HubSpot CRM?• Maintain an organized sales pipeline?• Update deal stages and contact records regularly

Wholesale Coordination

• Support wholesale communication with retail partners?• Help coordinate wholesale opportunities through Shopify?• Track retail accounts and maintain organized records



Required Skills

• Experience with B2B sales, outreach, or lead generation?• Strong written English communication?• Highly organized and detail-oriented?• Comfortable following up with prospects and partners?• Experience working with CRM systems (HubSpot preferred)?• Ability to manage multiple leads and conversations at once?• Comfortable making occasional outbound calls



Preferred Experience

• Experience selling to retailers or wholesale partners?• Shopify experience?• ClickUp or project management tools?• QuickBooks experience (invoicing and accounts receivable follow-ups)?• Canva experience for simple visuals or outreach materials



Availability

You must be available for at least 4 hours during this window:

10:00 AM – 2:00 PM Eastern Standard Time

Additional flexible hours are welcome.



What Success Looks Like

• Consistent outreach to qualified retail partners?• Opportunities tracked and managed in the CRM?• Strong follow-up with prospects and partners?• New wholesale relationships opening over time?• Organized and well-maintained sales pipeline



Compensation

Compensation will depend on experience.

This is a long-term remote role with growth opportunities for the right person.



How to Apply

Please include the following:

1. A short summary of your sales or lead generation experience

2. Your experience using CRM tools (HubSpot preferred)

3. Your resume or portfolio

4. Confirmation if you have experience with outbound calls

5. Your experience with QuickBooks invoicing or accounts receivable follow-ups

6. Confirmation you are available 10 AM – 2 PM EST

7. Your short-term and long-term career goals

title: Media Buyer at Market Leaders
description:
Media Buyer

Company: Market Leaders

Location: Remote (Philippines/Anywhere)

Compensation:
SGD




/testimonial-page





Who We Are



Market Leaders is on a mission: become a world-renowned coaching and marketing education brand by 2031. That's 2,200 days from today.



We're not your typical "hustle culture" startup. We're Asian roots, global reach—think Bruce Lee's philosophy applied to business education. We prove that "Peaceful & Profitable" isn't just a tagline; it's how we operate. High performance, zero drama. World-class results without burning out our team.



We're a lean 7-person remote team building something extraordinary. Our positioning is unique: we bring Asian wisdom (discipline, long-term thinking, respect) to global business education, delivered at world-class standards.



The Opportunity



We're looking for our Growth Architect—the person who will scale our VSL (Video Sales Letter) campaigns profitably and sustainably.



You won't just "run
 ads." You'll be the strategic engine behind customer acquisition. You'll test hypotheses, optimize funnels, collaborate with our creative team, and directly impact our path to becoming world-renowned.



This role is critical. Without profitable acquisition, nothing else matters. With it, we change lives globally.



Growth path: Start managing 2?3K/day in ad spend, scale over 12 months. As we grow, so does your responsibility—potentially building and leading a growth team.



What You'll Do



Campaign Management (Daily)

Manage
/Instagram ad campaigns driving traffic to our VSL funnels

Monitor performance across all ad accounts (currently spending 2?3K/day, scaling to 5K+)

Optimize bids, budgets, audiences, and placements to hit 3.5x+ ROAS targets

Make real-time decisions: pause underperformers, scale winners, test new angles



Strategic Testing (Weekly)

Launch 1-2 new audience tests weekly (cold, lookalike, interest-based)

Collaborate with our Content Director on creative A/B tests (hooks, angles, formats)

Run landing page optimization experiments with our Copywriter

Document learnings and build our "growth playbook"

Funnel Optimization (Ongoing)

Analyze the full VSL funnel (ad ? VSL page ? application ? sales call ? customer)

Identify drop-off points and collaborate cross-functionally to improve conversion rates

Use data to inform creative briefs, landing page iterations, and offer positioning



Scaling (As Performance Allows)

Identify campaigns ready to scale based on consistency and profitability

Implement gradual budget increases while maintaining ROAS (our framework: +20% every 3 days if stable)

Manage risk during scaling—know when to scale aggressively vs conservatively



Reporting & Communication (2x Weekly)

Create Loom video updates (Tuesdays + Fridays) covering: what's working, what's not, why, and next steps

Maintain real-time performance dashboards

Present strategic recommendations in weekly team strategy calls

Translate data into insights that non-marketers can understand



What You Bring



Must-Haves (Non-Negotiable)



Experience:

2+ years hands-on experience managing
/Instagram ad campaigns (ideally for education, coaching, or info products)

Proven track record scaling campaigns to $3K+/day profitably

Deep understanding of VSL funnel mechanics (ad ? video ? application ? high-ticket sale)

Experience managing $50K+/month ad budgets with clear ROAS accountability



Technical Skills:

 Ads Manager mastery (campaign structure, pixel optimization, audience building)

Google Analytics proficiency (funnel analysis, conversion tracking)

A/B testing methodology (statistical significance, test design, documentation)

Basic funnel-building tools (ClickFunnels, Leadpages, or similar)

Data analysis in Google Sheets/Excel (pivot tables, cohort analysis, dashboards)



Analytical Mindset:

You live in data but don't drown in it—you find signal in noise

You understand creative + data synergy (not just "numbers person")

You can explain complex performance trends in simple terms

You make decisions based on evidence, not gut feel alone



Communication:

Crystal clear written communication (Slack, Loom, docs)

Comfortable on video (you'll record regular updates)

Async-first mindset (we're remote across timezones)

You can advocate for your ideas while staying collaborative



Cultural Fit:

High performance, zero drama - You deliver excellent work without creating friction. We have a strict "no brilliant jerks" policy.

Team-first mentality - You celebrate team wins over personal credit. Collaboration > ego, always.

Peaceful & Profitable believer - You've experienced burnout and reject hustle culture. You prove excellent results don't require 80-hour weeks.

Continuous learner - You're evolving constantly. You read, test, learn from failures, and level up relentlessly.

World-class standards - You refuse to ship mediocre work. Quality over quantity, every time.



Nice-to-Haves (Bonus Points)

Experience with YouTube, TikTok, or LinkedIn ads (we're expanding platforms)

Worked with Asian or global multicultural teams (you understand cross-cultural communication)

Built creative briefs for design/video teams (you know how to translate data into creative direction)

Experience in education, coaching, or "expert brand" niches (you get our audience)

Google Ads or native advertising experience (diversification opportunities)

Previous remote work experience (you know how to thrive async)



Why Market Leaders?



Peaceful & Profitable Culture

We mean it. No Slack messages at 2 AM expecting responses. No "always be hustling" toxicity. We build for decades, not quarters. You'll have clear work hours, real weekends, and a team that respects boundaries.



Remote-First, Truly

Work from anywhere in the Asia-Pacific timezone. We meet async via Slack and Loom, with key Zoom calls twice weekly. No micromanagement. We care about outcomes, not hours logged. Trust is our default.



Career Growth Path

Months 1-6: Master our VSL campaigns, scale to $5K+/day, become autonomous

Months 7-12: Own multi-channel strategy (YouTube, TikTok tests), scale to $10K+/day

Year 2+: Build and lead growth team as we scale, become Head of Growth, equity potential



Team & Retreats

You'll work with a small, mighty team: Bryan & Melvin (co-founders, 10+ years building together), Morgan (Content Director, creative genius), Collen (Copywriter, conversion expert), [Other tea
mbers]



Quarterly team retreats (3-4 days, rotating Asian locations—Thailand, Bali, Vietnam, etc.). Fully paid.



Compensation & Perks

Salary:
SGD

Quarterly Retreats: Fully covered (flights, accommodation, activities)

Work-from-Anywhere: As long as timezone overlap works

Equity Potential: For exceptional long-term tea
mbers (12+ months)



Apply Now!

title: Social Media Manager at Market Leaders
description:
Social Media Manager at Market Leaders (Industry Titans)


/testimonial-page



Who We Are

Market Leaders (Industry Titans) helps established coaches, consultants, and service providers become industry authorities using modern AI and marketing strategies. Founded by Bryan Ang and Melvin Soh, we're a Singapore-based company working with ambitious entrepreneurs globally.



Our positioning is unique: Asian roots, global reach—we bring world-class marketing education with cultural authenticity. We're building toward becoming a world-renowned brand by 2031, and social media is a critical growth lever.



Our culture? Peaceful & Profitable—high performance without toxic hustle, zero drama, and a team-first mentality.



The Opportunity

Most companies want social media managers who post pretty content and chase vanity metrics.



We need a growth-driven strategist who turns followers into clients.



You won't just be scheduling posts. You'll be engineering social campaigns that build authority, drive engagement, and convert business owners into high-ticket clients. Your work directly impacts how entrepreneurs building 6–7 figure businesses discover and engage with us.



This role combines three rare skills:

AI mastery for scaling content production efficiently



Paid advertising expertise optimizing campaigns that convert



Community building creating relationships that drive real business results



If you can turn social platforms into client-generating assets while embodying our "Never Stop Evolving" and "High Performance, Zero Drama" values, this is your role.



What You'll Do



Content Creation & Strategic Execution (40%)

Create daily social posts across platforms that educate, engage, and convert

Design scroll-stopping graphics and visual content in Canva

Write compelling captions and copy that drive action

Repurpose existing content for maximum social distribution

Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude) to scale production without sacrificing quality



Community Building & Engagement (25%)

Respond to comments and DMs daily, building genuine relationships

Monitor brand mentions and join relevant conversations

Foster community growth through authentic interaction

Identify and engage with potential clients and partners



Paid Advertising & Conversion (20%)

Run and optimize paid social campaigns (Meta, LinkedIn)

Test ad creatives, copy, and audiences systematically

Manage ad budgets and maximize ROI

Track performance and iterate based on data



Analytics & Continuous Improvement (15%)

Track performance metrics weekly and identify trends

Analyze what's working and double down

Implement data-driven improvements

Collaborate with Content Director (Morgan) and Copywriter (Collen) on campaigns

Report insights to CMO (Bryan Ang)



What You Bring

Must-Haves (Non-Negotiable)







Experience & Proof

2+ years managing social media professionally (B2B/business content preferred)

Portfolio required showing account growth, engagement metrics, and campaign results

Proven track record growing accounts and driving measurable business outcomes



Technical Skills

Strong copywriting for social captions and posts

Proficient in Canva and graphic design fundamentals

Hands-on experience running paid social ads (Meta/LinkedIn)

Data analysis skills—you can read metrics, spot trends, and optimize accordingly

Comfortable with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude) to work smarter and faster



Work Style & Culture Fit

Never Stop Evolving: You learn something new every day and apply it immediately

High Performance, Zero Drama: Professional, reliable, no ego, no excuses

Self-starter who works independently without constant direction

Available for Singapore time zone overlap (GMT+8)

Reliable internet and professional workspace



Nice-to-Haves

Experience in coaching/consulting/education industries

Video editing skills

Understanding of Asian business culture + global markets

Experience with scheduling platforms (Buffer, Hootsuite, etc.)



Why Market Leaders?



Peaceful & Profitable Culture

We believe in world-class results without burnout. You'll work hard and smart, but we respect boundaries and sustainable performance.



Remote-First Flexibility

Work from anywhere in the Philippines. Async collaboration with clear communication norms.



Learn While You Earn

You're joining a marketing education company. You'll be immersed in cutting-edge strategies, AI tools, and world-class marketing thinking daily.



Growth Path

As we scale toward our 2031 mission, high performers grow with us. This role can evolve into Social Media Director, Growth Lead, or other leadership opportunities.



Team Culture

Small team (7 people), big impact. You'll work directly with Bryan (CMO), Morgan (Content Director), and Collen (Copywriter). Quarterly team celebrations and genuine collaboration.



Compensation & Support

Base Salary: SGD $800–1,000/month (based on experience)

Canva Pro subscription provided

AI tools access (ChatGPT, Claude)

Marketing tools and software provided



Our Hiring Process

We respect your time. Here's exactly what to expect:

Application + 3 Quick Tasks (60–90 min total)

60-Second Video Introduction (be yourself, show your energy)

Zoom Interview (60 min with Bryan and team—culture + role fit)

Reference Check (we'll verify with past managers)

Welcome to the Team!



Timeline: We review weekly and respond within 3–5 days. Top candidates hear back in 48 hours.



Apply Now :

title: SMS Campaign Specialist (Real Estate )
description:
Please review this job post completely before applying.



Job Title: SMS Campaign Specialist

title: Bookkeeper
description:
About the Role

Perfect Square Design is seeking an Accounts Manager to support the director of the business. This role will work closely with the Director to ensure accounts are up to date and in compliance with Australian Taxation Law. The position will focus on the Xero account managing sales, wages, expenses and debtors. This role will be transferred from an existing bookkeeping office to be managed internally within the studio. 



Key Responsibilities

• Invoicing

• Reconciliation 

• Call debtors to organise payment. Must present with excellent written and spoken English

• Review and manage sub-contractor invoices

• Review and manage supplier invoices if there are any

• Manage PAYG, GST & super every month and lodge

• Lodge BAS monthly

• Reconcile with bank accounts daily.

• Process payroll.

• weekly catchup with the director

• able to communicate, work with and follow instructions from our accountants.





Reporting & Documentation

• Assist in preparing presentation decks and business reports on Balance of Accounts and P/L records

• Support the development of internal documentation

• Maintain operational templates and files



Skills & Experience

• Strong organisational and administrative skills

• Experience working with Xero (Requirement to present proof of proficiency)

• Excellent written and spoken English communication

• Strong attention to detail

• Ability to manage multiple tasks and priorities

• Proficiency with Google Workspace or Microsoft Office

• Experience preparing presentations and documents

• Mandatory experience with Australian Tax Law (must have worked in Australian businesses with similar job expectations and prepared to provide evidence)



Please only apply if you are able to prove the above experience requirements.



Experienced level Expectations (Ave High)

title: Acquisition Specialist
description:
We are a growing real estate investment company looking for a motivated Virtual Assistant (VA) to help with lead generation and acquisitions for off-market properties. This role is ideal for someone who is confident speaking with homeowners, organized, and driven by performance-based commissions.



You will be responsible for contacting property owners, identifying motivated sellers, gathering property details, and nurturing leads until they are ready for a contract. Once the seller is ready to move forward, the deal will be handed off to our admin team for contract processing.



This position offers weekly pay plus a 5% commission on every deal that closes from your leads, giving you strong earning potential.



Use this link to apply: 



Only applicants who complete the application form will be considered.



Responsibilities





Reach out to property owners through calls, SMS,
, or other outreach methods



Identify homeowners who may be interested in selling their property at a discounted price



Build rapport with potential sellers and determine their motivation and timeline



Gather important property information including:



Property condition



Photos of the property



Ownership details



Property history



Reason for selling



Enter and update information in the CRM



Follow up with leads regularly until they are ready to move forward



Coordinate with the internal team once a seller is ready for a purchase agreement



Maintain organized records of all conversations and leads





Requirements





Strong English communication skills (spoken and written)



Comfortable speaking with homeowners on the phone



Experience in real estate, cold calling, or lead generation preferred



Familiarity with CRM systems is a plus



Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace



Ability to work full-time during U.S. business hours



Self-motivated and results-driven

title: Remote Insurance Dialer & Client Concierge (Final Expense Leads)
description:
Remote Insurance Dialer & Client Concierge (Final Expense Leads)

Part-Time to Full-Time Opportunity



We are a growing insurance agency focused on Final Expense coverage, and we’re looking for a reliable, experienced dialer with insurance industry experience to join our team.



This role will start part-time as a dialer. If you prove to be dependable and effective on the phones, the role will transition into full-time and expand into administrative support and client management.



We are building a high-touch, concierge-style client experience, so we’re looking for someone professional, organized, and confident speaking with clients.





Work Schedule



Part-Time (Starting Phase)

• Approximately 4 hours per day

• Pacific Standard Time (PST)

• Between 9:00 AM – 5:00/6:00 PM PST



Full-Time (After Proven Performance)

• Expanded hours within the same PST window

• Includes dialing + administrative responsibilities





Compensation

• $5/hour starting rate

• Opportunity to transition to full-time after proven performance

• Performance bonuses discussed during the interview



Primary Responsibilities



Outbound Dialing (Core Responsibility)



• Dial final expense leads from Google Sheets

• Target: approximately 500 dials per day

• Qualify prospects and determine interest

• Live transfer interested prospects to the agent

• Book appointments when live transfer is not possible

• Track outcomes and update lead status



Client Concierge & Support



After successful transition to full-time, responsibilities will expand to include:

• Managing relationships with existing policyholders

• Acting as a client concierge for our insurance clients

• Handling inbound client service calls

• Helping clients with policy questions or support needs

• Following up with clients on birthdays and relationship touchpoints



Insurance Carrier Coordination



• Communicating with insurance carriers regarding:

• Policy updates

• Payments

• Commissions

• Client policy questions



Recruiting Funnel Support



We use GoHighLevel (GHL) to recruit agents.



Responsibilities include:

• Taking inbound recruiting calls

• Briefly screening candidates and setting expectations

• Booking qualified candidates on the agent’s calendar



Systems & Tools Used



Experience with these tools is strongly preferred:

• GoHighLevel (GHL)

• Ringy Dialer

• Monday.com

• Google Sheets



Requirements

• Insurance industry experience (required)

• Experience with high-volume dialing or appointment setting

• Strong English communication skills

• Comfortable making 500+ calls per day

• Ability to stay organized and update CRM records accurately

• Professional and friendly phone presence

• Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace



Ideal Candidate



You are someone who:

• Has worked with insurance agencies or insurance sales teams

• Is confident speaking with prospects and clients on the phone

• Is organized and comfortable working inside CRMs

• Can follow systems and processes

• Wants a long-term role with growth opportunities



Application Instructions



To apply, please include:



A short introduction about your insurance industry experience

The dialing systems or CRMs you’ve used (Ringy, GHL, etc.)

Your 16Personalities (Myers-Briggs) personality test result



Applications missing these requirements will not be considered.

title: Cleaner Operations Coordinator

title: Telemarketing Specialist B2B / Appointment Setter (Remote – CRM Based)
description:
Job Description



We are seeking a reliable, motivated Telemarketing Specialist/Virtual Assistant to support our outbound sales efforts.



The primary responsibility of this role is to contact potential clients, introduce our services, qualify prospects, and schedule appointments for the sales team.



This is a long-term remote position for someone who is organized, confident on the phone, and comfortable speaking with business professionals. The role focuses on outbound calling, prospect follow-up, and appointment setting using a CRM system.



The ideal candidate has experience with telemarketing, outbound sales calls, or appointment setting.



Responsibilities



• Conduct outbound phone calls to potential business clients

• Introduce services and briefly explain the value offered

• Identify decision-makers and qualify potential clients

• Ask basic qualification questions regarding services and needs

• Schedule appointments or walkthrough meetings for the sales team

• Record call outcomes and notes inside the CRM system

• Follow up with prospects via phone and
 when needed

• Maintain organized records of prospects and conversations

• Achieve daily call targets and appointment-setting goals

• Provide feedback on lead quality and outreach results



Requirements



• Strong English communication skills (clear speaking and writing)

• Previous experience in telemarketing, cold calling, or appointment setting

• Comfortable making high-volume outbound calls

• Professional phone presence and confident communication style

• Ability to work independently and stay organized

• Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment

• Basic experience using CRM systems (HubSpot or similar preferred)



Skills Required



• Telemarketing

• Outbound Calls

• Appointment Setting

• Lead Generation

• CRM Management

• English Communication



Compensation



• Base Pay: $3 – $6 per hour, depending on experience

• Performance Bonuses: Based on activity and quality of leads

• Commission: Paid for qualified appointments that convert into clients

• Opportunity for increased hours and long-term work based on performance



Application Instructions



To apply, please include the following:



Application Instructions: To apply, please include the following in your application: 1. Your resume (PDF or Google Drive link) 2. A voice or video recording link (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself 3. A brief explanation of your telemarketing or outbound calling experience. Please make sure the recording is accessible via a public link (Google Drive, Loom, or YouTube unlisted). Applications without a resume and recording link may not be considered. In your recording, please answer the following: • Introduce yourself • Describe your telemarketing or outbound calling experience • Explain why you are interested in this role.

title: EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT – Phone Communications & Soft Sales [REMOTE]
description:
**ABOUT THE ROLE**

We’re a close, family-like U.S. long-term rental company looking for a sharp, resourceful, people-savvy Executive Assistant to support day-to-day operations. We’re hiring someone with proven, long-term professional experience — in any field. This is NOT an entry-level position.



We’ll train you on the “what” with leasing — but we need you to bring the “how” with real objection-handling and soft sales intuition. That means:

**Thinking fast under pressure and during live calls

**Guiding conversations naturally and persuasively

**Solving problems before they escalate

**Speaking English clearly and confidently on the phone

**Caring about the business like it’s your own



We value people who treat the business like they’re part of it — not just clocking hours. If you’re the kind of person who goes the extra mile because you take pride in doing great work, you’ll thrive here.



**WHAT YOU’LL ACTUALLY DO**

• Be a reliable, professional point of contact for current tenants

• Manage lease renewals and ongoing tenant communication

• Make phone calls to gather info, follow up, and resolve issues

• Coordinate tasks, track details, and prevent things from falling through the cracks

• Help solve problems independently — and escalate only when needed

• Keep the owner organized and focused



-> This is not a checklist-following job. It’s a *thinking* role for someone who can move fast, stay calm, and figure things out ...many times while still on the phone.



**WHO THIS ROLE IS PERFECT FOR**

• *You speak clearly, confidently, and professionally in English with minimal accent — especially on calls*

• You’re a natural problem solver who can handle unexpected challenges without panic

• You think fast, take initiative, and don’t need hand-holding

• You genuinely care about the quality of your work and the business you’re supporting

• You’re someone who prepares, researches, and shows up ready

• You value long-term stability and being part of a trusted team



-> No property management or sales experience required

-> *Training provided — but success in this role depends on your ability to communicate smoothly and handle objections in live conversations with clarity and confidence*



**WORK SCHEDULE**

This is Remote (Work from Home – must have reliable computer & internet)

• Full-time (40 hours/week) | Independent Contractor

• You choose your exact working hours, but must be reachable and responsive during U.S. Pacific Time business hours (7 AM – 7 PM, Mon–Fri), with active work occurring within that window



**COMPENSATION & GROWTH**

*Base pay up to $800/month to start,* with performance-based increases and bonuses for reliability, initiative, and strong work ethic.

Long-term role with real stability — no short-term rentals, no Airbnb chaos

Direct collaboration with the business owner — your work will actually make a difference



**FROM A CURRENT TEA
MBER**

“Working with Heavenly Happy Homes over the past year has been an experience I am truly blessed and grateful for. It has indeed been life-changing. From the very beginning, I felt trusted, supported, and encouraged to do my best. That kind of environment makes a huge difference, especially when working remotely. After going through uncertainty in a previous role, I was really praying to find a company where I could grow, learn, and feel secure long-term. Heavenly Happy Homes turned out to be exactly that and more. You genuinely find yourself loving the company and sincerely caring about the work you do. The culture here is respectful and collaborative, and everyone truly wants to see each other succeed. Even as a remote team, there is a strong sense of teamwork and shared purpose, which I honestly love. Training is efficient and well guided. R.S. helped me a lot, especially in understanding processes clearly. Another thing I can sincerely say is that hard work here never goes unnoticed. It is always valued and genuinely appreciated. Our boss is truly a wonderful employer!”



**HOW TO APPLY**

Submit your application here: 

Applications through OLJ may not be considered. Please complete the application at the link in this post.

title: Part-Time Acquisition Manager (Wholesale Closer + Comps) – Remote (Wed/Thu, $5hr, $20 bonues, commission)
description:
Company: Citrus Lane Rentals

Work Type: Part-time, remote



Schedule

 • Starting schedule: Wednesdays and Thursdays

 • Hours: 2 hours per day (4 hours/week)

 • Calling US sellers (must be comfortable speaking on the phone)

 • Additional hours may be added after a probationary review



Pay

 • $5/hour base

 • $20 per signed contract

 • Commission: 6% of the assignment fee (paid on closed/collected deals)



Job Overview



We are looking for a closing-focused Acquisition Manager to call motivated seller leads, run comps, present offers, negotiate, and get purchase contracts signed for our real estate wholesaling business.



What You Will Do

 • Call warm/hot seller leads and follow up consistently

 • Qualify sellers: motivation, timeline, condition, price

 • Run property comps (market value) to support offer pricing

 • Present offers clearly and professionally

 • Negotiate and handle objections

 • Get purchase contracts signed (DocuSign or similar)

 • Update notes and lead statuses in our tracking system

 • Coordinate handoff after signing (next steps with the team)



Required Skills

 • Strong English (spoken + written)

 • Confident on the phone (sales/closing experience)

 • Must know how to comp properties (sold comps, adjust for beds/baths/sqft, condition, days on market)

 • Able to use tools like Redfin/Zillow/Realtor (PropStream or similar is a plus)

 • Reliable and consistent every Wed/Thu

 • Organized follow-ups and clean notes

 • Stable internet, headset, quiet workspace



Preferred (Nice to Have)

 • Real estate wholesaling acquisitions experience

 • Experience calling US-based sellers



How to Apply (Required)



Send your application by
 to: Vladimir Ignacio (Operations Manager)





Include ALL of the following:

 1. Your experience (2–5 sentences)

 2. Your time zone + confirmation you can work Wed/Thu consistently

 3. Your equipment (internet speed + headset)

 4. Voice sample link (preferred)

 5. Comp Test (Required):

Comp this property: 15812 Starlite St, Clermont, FL 34714

Include:



 • Your step-by-step comp process (5–8 bullets)

 • At least 3 SOLD comps (0.5–1 mile if possible, similar beds/baths/sqft, sold within 6–12 months)

 • For each comp: address, sold price, sold date, beds/baths, sqft, link/source

 • Your final value range + best number, and 2–5 sentences why



 6. Objection question: How do you respond when a seller says “Your offer is too low”?



Applications missing any required items will not be considered.

title: Senior Talent Sourcing Specialist – Electrical Engineering
description:
Job description:



About MeshGrid HR



MeshGrid HR is a niche recruitment agency focused exclusively on the electrical power industry across the United States and Canada. We support clients in hiring hard-to-find technical talent across the power industry including but not limited to utilities, renewables, manufacturers, datacenters etc.



What makes us different is our technical edge in talent acquisition. Our leadership has strong technical background and our sourcing team all have electrical engineering backgrounds. This helps our team understand the industry beyond keywords and job titles. We speak the language of the market and work closely with manufacturers, consulting firms, utilities, EPCs, testing companies, and other organizations across the power sector to identify and attract high-caliber talent.



Position Overview



MeshGrid HR is seeking a Senior Talent Sourcing Specialist – Electrical Engineering to support our recruitment team by identifying and engaging qualified candidates for technical and hard-to-fill positions across the electrical power industry.



This role is ideal for someone who is highly resourceful, detail-oriented, and experienced in candidate sourcing. The Senior Sourcing Agent will be responsible for building talent pipelines through platforms such as LinkedIn Recruiter, Indeed Resume, and other sourcing tools, while working closely with recruiters and leadership to support active searches and long-term talent mapping initiatives.



Because we specialize in technical hiring within the electrical power sector, candidates for this role must have a Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engineering- Power Systems and prior recruitment or sourcing experience. A technical educational background is essential so the individual can better understand the positions, candidate profiles, and terminology used within our market.



Key Responsibilities



Source qualified candidates for technical positions across the U.S. and Canada using LinkedIn Recruiter, Indeed Resume, job boards, internal databases, referrals, and other sourcing channels

Build and maintain strong candidate pipelines for current and future openings

Partner closely with recruiters to understand job requirements, target companies, and ideal candidate profiles

Conduct targeted talent mapping across competitors, adjacent industries, and relevant markets

Identify passive candidates and develop outreach strategies to generate interest

Maintain accurate candidate records, notes, and activity within the ATS and internal tracking systems

Support market research related to talent availability, competitors, and hiring trends

Continuously improve sourcing strategies, search strings, and outreach methods to increase efficiency and candidate quality

Help maintain organized candidate pools by discipline, geography, and seniority level

Provide feedback to the recruiting team on market conditions, candidate response trends, and pipeline challenges



Required Qualifications



Minimum a Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engineering is required

Previous experience in recruitment, talent sourcing, or candidate research is required

Proven experience using sourcing tools such as LinkedIn Recruiter, Indeed Resume, and similar platforms

Familiar with using Applicant Tracking System (ATS) solutions

Strong understanding of Boolean search techniques and candidate identification strategies

Excellent reading and written English communication skills

Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

Ability to work independently and manage multiple searches at once

Comfortable supporting technical and engineering recruitment efforts

Ability to work 9 am to 5 pm Eastern Standard Time zone, Monday through Friday



Preferred Qualifications



Experience sourcing for the electrical power industry, engineering firms, OEMs, utilities, EPCs, or technical field service organizations

Familiarity with roles such as protection & control engineers, substation engineers, power systems engineers, relay technicians, commissioning specialists, application engineers, technical sales professionals, and related positions

Experience working in a recruitment agency environment



Why Join MeshGrid HR



Join a growing niche recruitment agency with a strong reputation in the electrical power industry

Work in a specialized environment where technical knowledge is genuinely valued

Be part of a team that understands the market and takes a quality-driven approach to recruitment

Gain exposure to leading companies across the U.S. and Canadian power sectors

Play a key role in helping clients solve real hiring challenges in a critical industry

title: Virtual Assistant for Job Application Support
