title: Travel Consultant (Tramada and Sabre GDS Exp)
description:
We are looking for an experienced Travel Consultant to join our team. The successful candidate will be responsible for designing and booking seamless travel experiences for clients while delivering exceptional customer service. This role requires strong experience with Sabre GDS and Tramada, along with the ability to manage bookings, issue tickets, and create detailed itineraries.





Key Responsibilities



Create customised travel itineraries for leisure and/or corporate clients.

Book flights, accommodation, transfers, tours, and travel insurance.

Issue and manage flight bookings using Sabre GDS.

Manage client bookings, documentation, and invoicing in Tramada.

Provide accurate quotes and travel options based on client preferences and budget.

Monitor ticketing time limits and payment deadlines.

Manage booking amendments, cancellations, and schedule changes.

Ensure all travel documentation is accurate before sending to clients.

Reconfirm bookings with airlines, hotels, and suppliers when necessary.

Maintain strong relationships with travel suppliers and partners.

Deliver excellent customer service and respond promptly to client enquiries.

Stay up to date with airline rules, fares, and travel industry updates.



Required Skills & Experience



Minimum 2–3 years experience as a Travel Consultant.

Strong working knowledge of Sabre GDS.

Experience using Tramada for booking and client management.

Strong airfare knowledge including ticketing and reissues.

Excellent communication and customer service skills.

High attention to detail and ability to manage multiple bookings.

Ability to work independently and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.



Preferred Experience



Experience in leisure, corporate, or luxury travel consulting.

Knowledge of international travel regulations and airline policies.

Experience working with multiple travel suppliers and wholesalers.



How to Apply



If you are a passionate travel professional with Sabre and Tramada experience, we would love to hear from you. Please submit your resume along with a brief cover note outlining your relevant experience. Send your application through this link:

Your main responsibilities:



Social Media

• Create 2–4
 posts per week

• Design the images/visuals for the posts

• Write engaging captions

 Marketing

• Create 1 sales-focused
 per week using Shopify

 campaigns



TikTok / Short Video Content (Bonus)

Payment

Important

All posts,
s and video captions must be written in Hungarian. You do not need to speak Hungarian fluently – you can write in English and translate using ChatGPT or other AI tools. We will help review and improve the final text if needed.



We are looking for someone who:

To apply, please include:

1. Examples of social media pages you managed

2. Examples of
 campaigns you created

title: General Virtual Assistant (Remote)
description:
Company: Share Wealth Systems (SWS)

Location: Remote (aligned to Australian time zone | 6:00 AM to 3:00 PM Philippines Time)

Type: Long-term, full-time



About Us:

At Share Wealth Systems, we help traders and investors build disciplined, rules-based approaches to the markets. We’re a small, collaborative team that values clear communication, openness, and a non-toxic environment.



About the Role:

We are looking for a General Virtual Assistant who is highly trainable and eager to grow with us. The work you’ll do will be very specific to our internal processes and tools, so we don’t expect you to come in knowing it all. Instead, we’re looking for someone with the right attitude and willingness to learn, and we’ll provide the training you need during onboarding.



This role involves supporting our team in administrative tasks, CRM-related work, and other business processes. Experience with Customer Relationship Management systems is a plus, and familiarity with Kartra would be an advantage, but neither is required.



What We Value Most:

- Good English communication (both spoken and written) — you should be comfortable expressing ideas clearly and confidently.

- Willingness to learn — we want someone who is open to training, adaptable, and proactive in applying feedback.

- Team and culture fit — we work closely together, and we’re looking for someone positive, dependable, and easy to work with.



Nice to Have (Not Required):

- Experience with CRM platforms (updating contacts, keeping records clean).

- Familiarity with Kartra or similar tools.



What We Offer:

- Remote work flexibility with a supportive international team.

- Monthly salary will be increased based on performance review after 3 months (probation period).

- Paid time off: 20 working days of paid annual leave.

- On-the-job training in proprietary systems and methods.

- Opportunity to contribute to a growing, innovative company in the financial technology space.



Compensation:

- USD: $500 – $650/month (approx. $2.80 – $3.75/hour)

- AUD: A$765 – A$995/month (approx. $4.29 – $5.74/hour)

Final offer will depend on evaluation of skills and experience fit.



Requirements:

- Must provide own computer and internet connection.

- Able to work from 09h00 to 18h00 AEST, Monday to Friday (with flexibility).

- Must be organized, self-motivated, and proactive in communication.



Application Process:

As the first step, we’d like you to submit a short 3–5 minute video introduction. In your video, please answer the following:

- Tell us about yourself and your background.

- Why are you interested in working with Share Wealth Systems?

- Share an example of when you had to learn a new tool or process quickly. How did you handle it?



Please upload your video to Google Drive, Dropbox, or use Loom and send us the link along with your resume.



We’re not looking for polished production quality, just clear communication and a genuine introduction.

title: Travel Consultant (Tramada and Travefy Exp)
description:
This role supports travel consultants in managing client bookings, itineraries, and communications. This role ensures smooth travel planning by assisting with research, booking administration, payment monitoring, and client correspondence. The position also maintains booking systems such as Tramada and Travefy while ensuring high levels of quality control and timely client communication.









Key Responsibilities







Consultant & Booking Support



Assist travel consultants in building client quotes and detailed travel itineraries.

Conduct hotel research to support itinerary development.

Assist consultants in booking client trips including flights, accommodation, and services.

Manage booking amendments and schedule changes when required.

Ensure seating on flights is allocated where possible.

Provide suppliers with additional client details when required.







Booking Management & Quality Control



Conduct booking quality control checks prior to documentation being issued to clients.

Reconfirm hotel bookings directly with hotels.

Confirm client special requests with suppliers and hotels.

Track ticketing time limits within the GDS system.

Monitor deposit deadlines and final payment due dates.

Follow up outstanding payments with clients when necessary.







Client Communication



Draft client communications on behalf of consultants.

Send booking confirmations and reminders to clients.

Send pre-travel
s with relevant travel information.

Conduct post-travel follow-up
s to gather feedback and ensure client satisfaction.







Inbox & Enquiry Management



Monitor shared inboxes and allocate enquiries to consultants.

Monitor personal inboxes and assist consultants in managing incoming client requests.







System & Data Management



Collate and maintain client information ensuring Tramada is always up to date.

Manage Travefy itineraries and integration with Tramada (when linked – currently a work in progress).

Maintain and update preferred hotel spreadsheets within Travefy and Tramada.

Ensure booking data, notes, and documentation are accurate and organized within systems.







Systems Used



Tramada – Client and booking management

Travefy – Client itineraries and trip management

GDS (Global Distribution System) – Ticketing time limits and flight management

Internal
 systems and shared inboxes







Key Skills & Competencies



Strong attention to detail and quality control

Excellent written communication skills

Strong organizational and time-management abilities

Ability to manage multiple bookings and deadlines simultaneously

Client service mindset

Proficiency with travel systems and booking tools

Ability to work collaboratively with consultants and suppliers







Preferred Experience



Previous experience in travel administration, travel consulting support, or travel operations

Familiarity with Tramada, Travefy, and GDS systems

Experience coordinating bookings with hotels, airlines, and travel suppliers



Please submit your application through this link:

title: Female Remote Inbound Appointment Setter (Med Spa)
description:
We help med spas pack their calendars with lip filler and 
 appointments using
 ads. You will be the first voice our clients’ leads hear. That means you are not “just a caller” – you are the front line of revenue.



We have a lot of fun, but we take our work very seriously. The goal is simple:

Be the best.

Have fun doing it.



We do not hire people to “try sales.” We hire people who want to get very good at it. If that sounds like you, keep reading. 



Schedule: flexible 5 days per week, must be available to help out some weekends, Here are the hours in EST 

Morning shift: 8 am – 3 pm EST

Evening shift: 3 pm – 11 pm EST



What You Will Do:

You will live in two modes all day: Hunting leads and Closing leads



Hunting:

Call new leads within 60 seconds every time you are not already on a call. This is non negotiable. Speed to first contact is the biggest driver of show rates. 

Work all clients’ leads in priority order:

Use GHL, Slack and our internal workflows so no lead is ever left behind.

Run our C.L.O.S.E.R. scripts word for word, naturally.

Clarify their goals, label their problem, understand what they’ve tried, then book them into the right offer.

Handle concerns and reinforce their decision so they actually show.



What Success Looks Like...

You are winning here if:

New leads are called in under 60 seconds 

You rehearse the script so much you can breathe it

You follow up a lot, and you personalize them based on the lead’s goal



Compensation:

Base: $500 USD per month + $1,000 Performance pay for doing minimum daily tasks: + (100% of current setters hit this, it is the standard, not a stretch)

Bonuses:

Monthly performance challenges up to +$500 USD extra

Uncapped +$5 USD bonus  for every low ticket booking you generate

Realistic monthly earnings for a solid performer: $1,500 USD





We pay for results and consistency. If you show up, work the system, and hit your numbers, you will earn well above typical VA roles.

Requirements

Non?negotiables:

Comfortable working EST shifts (either 8 am – 3 pm or 3 pm – 11 pm), 5 days per week including rotating weekends with your teammates.





Strong spoken English with a clear, neutral accent that works for US patients.





Internet at least 100 Mbps up and down, stable power (or a reliable backup).





Quality headset, quiet workspace, large monitor + laptop.





Experience in appointment setting, call center, sales, or high?volume customer support is preferred, but raw coachability and work ethic matter more.





Tools you will use daily: GoHighLevel (GHL), Slack





How We Train You:

You get a full playbook and training system:

Daily script rehearsal, roleplays, and call reviews in week one.

A detailed Appointment Setter Handbook that shows you exactly how to win here.

Ongoing coaching so your skills and income go up over time.





The people who win here:

Show up every day and do the repetitive work.

Take notes, ask questions, and actually fix their mistakes.

Treat this like a career, not a side hustle.





**How To Apply**

Send over a voice recording from 
 talking about:



- Why you think you’d be a fit for this role

- Any relevant experience (preferred, not required)

- A goal want to achieve (can be short or long term)



If I like how it sounds, I’ll respond with the next steps for getting started

title: Content Marketing & Marketing Operations VA for Auto Service Business | 10-12 HRS PER WEEK
description:
We are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Content Marketing & Marketing Operations VA to support a growing local auto service business.



This business already has a strong reputation, loyal customers, and excellent reviews. Most growth has come through word of mouth and referrals. We are now looking for someone who can help bring more structure, consistency, and support to the company’s marketing efforts.



This is not just a basic posting role.



We want someone who understands content marketing, can communicate clearly, can follow directions, and can help turn business assets into organized marketing support. The owner is able to provide photos and video, so we need someone who can help turn that into useful content and marketing execution.



This role may start part-time, but there is room to grow for the right person.



What You May Help With:

- Organizing photos, videos, reviews, and other content assets

- Writing captions, post copy, and simple marketing content

- Helping create a more consistent online presence

- Turning customer reviews, before-and-after work, promotions, and service highlights into content ideas

- Assisting with light website content updates or simple edits

- Helping organize marketing tasks and content workflows

- Identifying gaps and making practical suggestions

- Supporting local business marketing efforts with clear execution



What We Are Looking For:

- Strong written English

- Real experience in content marketing

- Ability to explain your experience clearly and specifically

- Ability to follow instructions carefully

- Organized, dependable, and responsive

- Able to take direction and also think proactively

- Comfortable supporting a business owner who provides photos and videos

- Able to turn ideas into execution, not just wait for step-by-step tasks



 *Bonus if you have experience with local service businesses, automotive businesses, or basic website editing



Important!!



Please read this entire post carefully.



We are not looking for copy-paste applications, vague responses, or generic AI-written answers. If your application does not follow directions or does not clearly explain your experience, it will not be considered.



We are specifically looking for someone who can show how they think, explain what they have actually done, and communicate like a real person.



How to Apply:

Please follow these instructions exactly.



1) Use this subject line at the top of your application:



"Auto Lux Content VA Application – [Your Name]"



2) In the first line of your application, write this exact phrase:



"I read the full job post."



3) Then answer the following questions in full sentences:



A. Tell us about your actual experience with content marketing.

Do not just say you can do it. Explain the kinds of businesses you supported, what content you worked on, and what your responsibilities were.



B. Share 2 specific examples of content or marketing work you have done for a business.

For each example, explain:

   - what type of business it was

   - what you created, managed, or improved

   - what your role was

   - what result came from your work



C. If a business owner sends you photos, short videos, customer reviews, and a basic website, how would you begin helping improve their marketing presence?

Be specific in how you would approach it.



D. What experience do you have with light website edits or website content updates?

Please list the platforms you have used, if any.



E. Why are you a good fit for a business that has grown mostly through word of mouth and referrals, but now wants stronger marketing support?



4) Also include the following:

   - your monthly rate within our posted range

   - your weekly availability

   - your internet speed

   - links or samples of relevant work, if available



5) Keep your application clear, direct, and human.



We are paying close attention to whether you actually answer the questions and explain your real experience.

title: Full-Time Website Content Writer (SOP-Based / Claude AI)
description:
About Us:

Contractor Kingdom is a digital marketing agency that works with local service businesses. Think HVAC companies, plumbers, roofers, that kind of thing. We build and manage their websites, and a big part of what we do is producing high-quality, SEO-driven website content at scale.

We've built a structured system for how content gets made here. You're not going to be staring at a blank page wondering what to write. You'll follow detailed SOPs, use Claude AI as your primary writing tool, and turn out polished, publish-ready pages on a consistent basis.



The Role:

You'll be writing website pages for our clients using our content system. That includes service pages, location pages, about pages, niche pages, and more. Everything is built from client onboarding documents, sitemaps, and keyword data that we hand you.

Here's what a normal day looks like. You open a Claude project, upload the client's documents (onboarding form, brand voice guide, sitemap, NAP data, service area info, negative keyword list), and start requesting pages one by one using our prompt structure. Then you polish the output. You're checking grammar, formatting sections, adding CTAs, annotating design and dev notes, hyperlinking citations, and organizing everything into properly named and tabbed Google Docs inside the client folder.

At full capacity, you'll be producing 50+ pages per week across multiple clients.



What We're Looking For:

This role is not about being fast for the sake of being fast. We want someone who gets that smooth is fast and fast is slow. Someone methodical, detail-oriented, and consistent. The kind of person who follows every step of an SOP because they understand why each step is there.

You need strong English writing skills. That's non-negotiable. You're going to be reviewing, editing, and polishing AI-assisted content, so your grammar and natural phrasing need to be sharp. You should be comfortable cleaning up content and making it read like a real person wrote it.

Communication matters a lot here. You'll be working closely with our team, asking questions when something isn't clear, and flagging anything that feels off. We want someone who speaks up, not someone who sits quietly when they're stuck.

You need to have the availability for full-time work and the interest in growing with us. This is not a side gig.



Strong Pluses

These aren't hard requirements, but they'll move you to the top of the list.



Experience with Claude AI from Anthropic. You've used it, you understand prompting, and you're comfortable working inside Claude Projects.

WordPress experience. You know your way around pages, posts, and basic site structure.

A baseline understanding of SEO. You know what a silo structure is, why internal linking matters, and how keyword targeting works at the page level.

A mindset for improving systems. If you spot a way to make the process better, we actually want to hear about it.





To Apply:

Tell us about your experience with content writing, especially anything related to website copy, SEO content, or working with AI tools. If you've used Claude before, say so. If you have WordPress experience, mention that too. 



We are moving fast, We have immediate work & training ready for you! We will be hosting interviews & hiring next week!

title: Operations Manager Aviation
description:
We are an Australian-based multi-business platform operating across aviation (Jet Engines), finance and treasury, commercial real estate and digital assets.



As our organisation continues to grow, we are seeking a Remote Located Operations Manager to maintain operational discipline across the business and ensure our internal operating systems are consistently followed.



You will help keep work progressing across the organisation by maintaining operational visibility, coordinating projects and ensuring commitments are tracked and completed. This is not a passive oversight role. You will work directly inside our operational systems — maintaining dashboards, following up actions and ensuring projects continue moving forward.



You will work directly with the founder and internal team to ensure operational work remains organised, documented and progressing across multiple business units.



What You Will Do

Track active projects, deals and operational activities across the organisation and ensure they are accurately reflected in our operational systems.

Coordinate Internal Execution

Ensure tasks, responsibilities and deadlines are clearly recorded and followed through across multiple business areas including aviation, finance, real estate and treasury.

Run Internal Execution Meetings

Prepare operational summaries, run internal execution meetings, track action items and ensure commitments made during meetings are recorded and completed.

Maintain Operational Systems

Keep project management tools, dashboards and documentation organised and up to date so the team always has a clear view of operational progress.

Track Strategic Initiatives

Monitor internal initiatives and ensure operational steps required to move projects forward are coordinated and followed up.



What This Role Does NOT Include

No customer support

 No sales, marketing, or lead generation

 No cold calling

 No passive task managers — this role is for people who ensure work gets completed



About You

To succeed in this role you will ideally have the following:

5+ years experience in operations, project coordination, process management or internal execution roles

Strong organisational and systems discipline

Experience working with task management tools, operational dashboards or project tracking systems

Ability to follow up consistently and close loops on tasks and commitments

Desirable

Work Setup

mbers who demonstrate reliability, structure and execution discipline are given increasing responsibility as the organisation grows.

title: Social Media Marketing Specialist — Vacation Rental Startup (TripSkip)
description:
## Job Description



 **About Us**



 TripSkip (
) is a fast-growing discovery platform for vacation rentals. We connect property hosts with

 travelers — guests search for FREE and book directly with hosts, cutting out expensive middleman fees. We're currently

  filling our Founders Program (first 5,000 hosts at $49/year for unlimited listings) and scaling aggressively.



 We have an automated content engine that generates 70–100+ social media posts per day using AI tools. We need a sharp,

  reliable social media marketing specialist to manage the human side — posting in communities, engaging with real

 people, handling comments and DMs, and converting interest into signups.



 **What You'll Do**



 **Social Media Posting & Community Engagement (Primary — 70% of your time)**

 - Post to 50–75+
 groups daily using our proven templates (we provide 10+ templates — you customize and rotate

  them)

 - Engage in short-term rental (STR) and vacation rental communities on
, Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, and

 X/Twitter

 - Comment on other people's posts to build visibility and relationships (5–10 community comments/day)

 - Respond to ALL comments on your posts within a few hours

 - Handle inbound DMs from interested hosts — qualify leads, answer questions, and direct them to sign up

 - Follow group rules carefully to avoid bans (we'll train you on this)



 **Content Review & Scheduling (15% of your time)**

 - Review AI-generated content (short videos, images, carousels) for quality, accuracy, and brand alignment before

 publishing

 - Approve or reject content in our queue system (Supabase dashboard)

 - Schedule and coordinate posts across platforms:
, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, LinkedIn, Pinterest,

 X/Twitter

 - Ensure every shared link includes proper UTM tracking codes (we provide pre-built links)



 **Lead Tracking & Reporting (15% of your time)**

 - Track all group activity, posts, and engagement in a Google Sheets spreadsheet

 - Log leads and follow up with interested hosts

 - Escalate hot leads (property managers with 10+ properties) to the founder

 - Submit a weekly report every Friday covering: posts made, engagement numbers, top-performing content, leads

 generated, and any issues

 - Track which templates and groups perform best to refine strategy over time



 **What We're Looking For**



 *Must-Haves:*

 - 2+ years of experience in social media marketing or community management

 - Excellent written English — your posts need to sound natural and conversational, not robotic or overly formal

 - Experience posting in and engaging with
 Groups (this is the #1 channel)

 - Comfortable managing multiple social media platforms 
, Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, Pinterest, X/Twitter)

 - Detail-oriented — you'll track everything in spreadsheets and follow SOPs precisely

 - Self-starter who can work independently with minimal supervision

 - Reliable internet connection and computer



 *Nice-to-Haves:*

 - Familiarity with the vacation rental / short-term rental / Airbnb hosting industry

 - Experience with social media scheduling tools (Buffer, Blotato, Later, Hootsuite, etc.)

 - Basic understanding of UTM tracking and marketing analytics

 - Experience with Canva or basic graphic design

title: Facebook & Instagram Ad Manager
description:
We are in need of a skilled
 Ads Manager who is diligent, dependable, resourceful, and works with consistent quality. 

 

We’re looking to add a committed person to the team ASAP. You must have experience managing at least two of the following types of
 & Instagram ads for online course creators. 

• lead magnet ads

• launch registration ads & cart-open ads

• low-ticket offer or SLO ads





Do not apply if you only have experience managing ads for ecomm, retail or brick and mortar businesses.





You must be reliable, pay attention to ad details, be orderly, willing to follow long detailed instructions and 100% committed to getting results for our clients. Your position is ultra crucial for the business’s growth because the business needs great ads management and satisfied clients to succeed. 

 

This is a fully remote part-time role requiring 15 - 20 hours per week. Pay is $8 - $9 USD/hour depending on experience. Approximate working hours are USA MDT time zone: 9:00am - 12:00pm with one 15-minute break. 









You will have time off for all national and special Philippine holidays.



There will be a two-month trial period on a graduated pay scale meaning you will start at $7.00 - $8.00/hour DOE, receive an additional $0.50/hour increase each month and be able to receive full pay once you successfully complete your probationary period.





In addition, once you successfully complete your two-month probationary period, 

• in addition to your pay, you will receive a performance bonus for each account that you meet your KPIs in.

































 

Are you already good at managing
 ads and open to learning more ads management strategies?

Can you methodically and relentlessly test different combinations of ads components in order to get favorable lead costs for our clients? 

























Job Responsibilities:

Your role, the Ads Manager (referred to as “AM”) in our business, is an exceptional position on the team where you will work both directly with the CEO AND work with all other tea
mbers. This role works alongside the business’s video editor and Admin VA. This role reports directly to and is managed by the CEO.













The Ads Manager must: 









1. Maintain or reduce client’s weekly average lead costs and/or sales costs. 

2. Prepare clients’ account status reports with 100 percent accuracy.  

3. Manage clients’ ads according to our business’s ads management protocols with few to no mistakes w/o oversight from the CEO and also be able to meet performance targets. 

4. Promptly escalate any client ad account issues to the CEO.

5. Proactively optimize & update clients’ ad accounts: ad creative, audiences, ad copy, and headlines.

6. Proactively create and maintain easy to understand standard operating procedures (SOPs) for all tasks related to the ads manager role.

7. Keep clients’ ads project information up to date in our project management software (Asana).

8. Create biweekly ads reports and accurately include all client ad data according to the template.

9. Independently initiate and complete client onboarding responsibilities and communicate with the CEO to:

ensure clients are onboarded successfully: 

– Clients’ analytics are set up and accurately report data. 

– Clients’ ads management starts on schedule.

10. Complete ad hoc administrative tasks thoroughly, efficiently and on time.

11. Identify opportunities to make business systems more efficient, implement the solution and communicate with the rest of the team.













The AM is generally responsible for: 

• Being the most knowledgeable tea
mber about the client’s account and maintaining client’s account in good status









•
 Ads Management 

– Ad campaign set up

– Ad audience set up

– Ad testing and optimization

– – Testing audiences

– – Testing ad copy

– – Testing ad headlines

– – Testing ad creative













• Coordinating with the CEO and Admin VA in Asana to prepare client’s projects to run ads













• Prepare new client’s ad account ads

– Verifying that clients has the
 pixel installed on their landing page and thank you page

– Installing
 pixels and in client software when the client can’t do it themselves

– Setting up standard targeting audiences









• Prepare biweekly ads reports for all accounts they manage









• Managing SOPs related to the Ads Manager’s role and areas of responsibility

– Creating, maintaining and updating Ads Manager SOPs













Basically, your role as an ads manager is absolutely fundamental to continuing the growth of our business.













Requirements:

• 100% commitment to not waste client’s ad budget running ads that aren’t working

• Demonstrated proof of at least an upper-intermediate understanding
 Ads

**Although you will receive training, you should already have LOTS of experience running
 & Instagram ads for online course creators. 

• Ultra attention to ads metrics details

• Ability to absorb a lot of ads data/metrics and make sound decisions

• Proactiveness to communicate ad account information to CEO

• Follow instructions and SOPs

• Clear communication skills, both verbal and written

• Proactively coordinate with other tea
mbers

• Willing to learn new skills (design, ads management, ai) and tech tools

• Ability to resourcefully solve problems

• Exceptional organizational skills

• Tech savvy + Google search literate (meaning you know your way around technology and can learn new things by Googling or watching YouTube videos.)

















About The Owner of The Art of Online Business:

Kwadwo (pronounced QU?Y. jo) is the host of The Art of Online Business podcast, with over 5 million downloads. He helps course creators whose businesses already work and who are the primary earners in their household to confidently use
 and Instagram ads to grow revenue and support their families.





A former teacher and course creator himself, Kwadwo brings more than five years of ad management experience and a decade of teaching clarity to simplify complex marketing decisions. His clients, many earning $250k–$1.2M annually, rely on him to run profitable launches, optimize funnels, and remove the stress of figuring out ads alone.





Originally from the U.S., Kwadwo spent 12 years living in China before moving to central Mexico with his wife and two kids. He speaks fluent Mandarin Chinese and conversational Spanish, and believes the best businesses are built not just to scale, but to create freedom for the people behind them.









Some of his values and thus the business’s values are: positivity, motivation, humor, enthusiasm, creativity, international travel, inspiration, respect, community and accountability.













Our Tech Stack:

Since you will need to work efficiently on assigned tasks all by yourself or with little assistance, ideally you will have working knowledge of a few products in our tech stack. If not, we will use screen recordings, an onboarding document and Zoom calls to explain what needs to be done and how to do it.

 

However you MUST be willing to use Google and YouTube to learn the software required for your job. Your professional development is important to the success of the business, and we will purchase courses for you when needed. 

 

You need to be able to use our complete tech stack proficiently within your first five weeks of working with us.

• Meta Ad Manager

• Google Drive, Google Docs, Google Sheets, Google Forms

• Asana (project management)

• ChatGPT

• Slack

• Calendly

• Canva (design)

• ThriveCart

• Zoom

• Gmail

• LastPass 









Please, only apply if you are super detail oriented and you are already a capable Meta ads manager. You must have at least 2 years of experience managing
 & Instagram ads. 









Of the qualified applicants, we will prioritize those that have more familiarity with our tech stack, especially a lot of experience with Meta Ads (you will have to prove your knowledge in order to be considered for a position). 









If you don’t receive a response from us, that means we chose not to pursue employment at this time. 













How to Apply:

If your interest is piqued, please reply to this job post and do the following; 

1. Include only your favorite ice cream flavor and the name of who placed third in the 2004 Olympics men's 100m butterfly event in the subject line. 

2. Respond with how many dollars in ad spend Kwadwo has managed & a tip that Miss Brazil shared on Kwadwo’s Chinese YouTube channel.

3. Read to see how clients can work with [QUAY. jo] on 
.

4. Include a screenshot of your 4-letter personality type and results from 

5. List which software in our tech stack you already know how to use and your approximate proficiency with it on a scale of 1 - 10.

6. Do not send a resume.

7. Tell us whether or not you already have a day job.

8. Let us know how many hours you are available to work each week, for example 25, 30 or 40 etc.





Please, only apply if you are super detail oriented and you are beyond organized. You must have at least 2 years of work experience in the admin or VA space for an online business.





We are looking to bring you on board and want you to be a part of our dynamic, very small but fun team. You’ll be a central and integral part of our small team and we’re looking for you to grow with us!





Your application will be disqualified if you
 us directly, fill out the Meta ads intake form on the website, book a discovery call with us, write a subject line resembling anything like "I’m your next rockstar"  "applying for..." "_____ application" "your next ________ " or if you follow or D
 on social media.





We will consider applicants who are able to successfully fulfill the eight criteria above. 

Thank you for taking the time to apply.

title: Sales Closer / Cold Caller for B2B Paint Product
description:
Experienced Cold Caller / Lead Generator for Proprietary Paint Product



We are a paint manufacturer selling a specialized proprietary paint product to real estate management companies across the United States. We are looking for an experienced, professional, and highly persuasive cold caller / lead generator to help us connect with property management companies, introduce our product, and generate genuine interest from decision-makers.



This is a long-term, full-time opportunity for the right person. We are looking for someone who is confident on the phone, speaks excellent English, has a clear and professional speaking voice, and is able to build rapport quickly with all types of people. Minimal accent is strongly preferred.



Your main responsibility will be to make outbound calls to real estate management companies from our provided lead lists using GoHighLevel. The goal of this role is to get decision-makers interested in our product, identify qualified prospects, and help move conversations to the next step. If a prospect needs more detailed follow-up, additional information, or a more advanced sales conversation, our team can take over from there. You will also be assigned a manager who can assist with difficult calls when needed.



We are not looking for someone who is shy on the phone or afraid of objections. We want someone who is smooth, persuasive, comfortable speaking with gatekeepers and decision-makers, and able to handle awkward or challenging conversations professionally. Sales experience is important, and you should be able to show proof of previous experience in sales, lead generation, cold calling, appointment setting, or similar work.



Responsibilities:



* Make outbound calls to real estate management companies from our provided lead database

* Introduce and explain our specialized proprietary paint product

* Generate interest and identify qualified prospects

* Get past gatekeepers and handle objections professionally

* Speak confidently with property managers, management companies, and decision-makers

* Keep detailed notes and update call activity in GoHighLevel

* Follow up with interested prospects when appropriate

* Work closely with management when a prospect is ready for the next step

* Consistently work through large lead lists in a professional and organized manner



Requirements:



* Minimum 3 years of experience in cold calling, telemarketing, lead generation, appointment setting, sales, or a similar role

* Strong English speaking and writing skills

* Clear, professional phone voice

* Minimal accent strongly preferred

* Strong communication and persuasion skills

* Comfortable handling objections and difficult conversations

* Professional, confident, and articulate on the phone

* Able to build rapport and create interest quickly

* Organized, dependable, and self-motivated

* Comfortable using GoHighLevel or similar calling / CRM platforms

* Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment

* Must be able to show proof of prior sales or calling experience



Schedule:

Monday through Friday

10:00 AM to 3:00 PM Eastern Time



This position is for someone looking for steady, consistent, long-term work. We are looking for a dependable person who wants to grow with us over the years.



To apply, please respond through this platform and include the following:



* Your current resume

* Your availability

* Your desired pay rate

* Your earliest start date

* A very short video introducing yourself and explaining why you would be a good fit for this role, or a short voice memo if you prefer



Please include “Experienced Sales Closer” in the subject line of your application.



We look forward to hearing from you and exploring the possibility of working together.



God bless all applicants.



Eric B

title: Content and Video Operator
description:
Role Overview



The Content and Video Operator is responsible for turning raw ideas and footage into consistent, high quality content across platforms. This role ensures marketing never goes silent.



This is not a creative director role.

This is an execution role focused on speed, consistency, and follow through.

Ensure content is edited, scheduled, and published consistently according to the content plan.

• Edit raw video into short form content optimized for engagement

• Repurpose content across multiple platforms

• Maintain and follow a content calendar

• Organize raw footage and finished assets

• Apply basic captions, text overlays, and branding

• Hit deadlines consistently without reminders

Required Skills and Traits



• Video editing proficiency

• Attention to detail

• Ability to follow creative direction

• Organized file management

• Consistent and deadline driven

• Comfortable with repetitive production tasks



Preferred Experience



• Experience editing short form content

• Familiarity with CapCut, Adobe Premiere, or similar tools

• Experience working with content calendars



Creativity is helpful. Consistency is mandatory.



Performance Expectations

Work Details

title: Video Editor (Meta Ads)
description:
JOB OVERVIEW

Hiring: Video Editor (Meta Ads) — Nashie.

We're Nashie — the collared, button-up swim shirt (UPF50+). We're scaling hard on Meta ads and looking for a video editor who can create scroll-stopping ad creatives that convert. 

Offering above average wage, looking for high quality skills, creativity and communication.



What you'll work on:



- Editing UGC-style short-form video ads (talking head, testimonials, lifestyle clips) for Meta 
 & Instagram)

- Creating clean product showcase videos with text overlays, motion graphics, and strong hooks

- Cutting and repurposing raw footage into multiple ad variations for A/B testing

- Adding captions, text overlays, and on-screen CTAs optimised for sound-off viewing

- Producing videos in multiple formats and aspect ratios (9:16, 1:1, 4:5)

- Collaborating with our marketing team on creative concepts, hooks, and angles

- Quick-turnaround iterations based on performance data and feedback





Tell us about you (copy/paste & answer)

- Confidence (1–10):

- CapCut ___ / Canva ___ / Premiere Pro ___ / After Effects ___

- Meta Ads: Have you edited video ads for Meta 
/Instagram) before? Y/N

- UGC-style content: Have you edited UGC or creator-style video content? Y/N

- Product videos: Have you created product showcase videos for eCommerce brands? Y/N

-Captions & text overlays: Are you comfortable adding captions, animated text, and on-screen CTAs to videos? Y/N

- Portfolio: Share relevant video ad examples (links). Critical — show your best-performing or most polished Meta ad work specifically.



- Process: Walk us through how you'd approach editing a 15–30 second Meta ad from raw footage. What's your workflow for hooks, pacing, and keeping viewers watching?

- Ad formats: How do you handle creating multiple aspect ratios (9:16, 1:1, 4:5) from a single edit? Do you reframe manually or use auto-crop tools?

- Turnaround & availability: Typical turnaround time for a single ad creative + weekly availability (hours/timezone).



- Mini test (optional but strongly preferred)

We want to see what you can do. Here's a raw video — edit it into a scroll-stopping Meta ad:

Raw footage: 

Requirements:



Add on-screen text at the start: "Why my husband REFUSES to wear sun cream"

Add captions throughout

Add transitions, cuts, and pacing that keep viewers hooked

Make it sound-off friendly (captions/text must carry the story)



- Beyond that — get creative. We want to see YOUR style. Add motion graphics, zoom effects, sound design, b-roll, whatever you think makes this video more engaging and thumb-stopping as a Meta ad. Show us what you'd do if this was your brand.



- Specs: Deliver in 9:16 (Reels/Stories). Keep it punchy — under 60 seconds ideally. Need to also be able to edit in 1:1 and other sizes.



- Deliverables: MP4 file + if you would like - short note explaining your creative choices (why you cut where you cut, what effects you added and why, music/sound choices).



Nice to have skills:

title: Expierenced Customer Support & PayPal Dispute Agent – Dropshipping /  ReAmaze
description:
We are looking for an experienced Customer Support Agent with proven PayPal dispute-handling experience to join our e-commerce team immediately. We are running a beauty/health dropshipping funnel store in the UK and will go live with a second store in Australia soon. 

This is a long-term, ongoing role for someone who already understands dropshipping customer support & PayPal disputes, and can operate independently from day one. Experience using customer support platforms such as ReAmaze, Gorgias, Zendesk, or similar tools is a must.



Your Responsibilities:

- Handle customer support
s daily

- Manage order cancellations, refunds, and reshipments

- Handle PayPal disputes, including: Customer communication, Evidence submission, Status follow-ups

- Maintain refund, cancellation, and chargeback tracking sheets to keep financial overview

- Manage 
ments using tools like Brandwise: Reply to positive comments, Hide negative comments when required

- Work inside Shopify, including: Responding to Chargebacks, Checking order details, Solving address issues with customers

- Communicate with suppliers via Slack to: Answer customer product questions, Resolve shipping or delivery issues

- Follow SOPs and templates while keeping replies personal and professional



Required Experience (IMPORTANT)

You must have:

- Proven experience in dropshipping customer support (preferably with beauty/health products niche)

- Experience handling EU, UK, AU customers

- Hands-on experience with PayPal disputes

- Experience using customer support platforms such as ReAmaze, Gorgias, Zendesk, or similar tools

- Experience working with support automations, workflows, macros/templates, and inbox organization inside these tools

- Experience tracking: refunds, cancellations, chargebacks in Google Sheets or similar

- Experience with Shopify customer and order management

- Experience using Brandwise or similar tools for 
ment moderation

- Experience communicating with suppliers (Slack or similar)

- Must be able to handle at least 30-40 customer support
s per day while maintaining high-quality and accurate responses



This is not a beginner role. Training will be minimal.



Availability:

- Available to start immediately

- Able to work 6 days per week, at least 4 hours a day (note, both stores have just been set up so the first phase will be less hours of work)

- Comfortable with daily inbox handling and time-sensitive issues



What We Value:

- Accuracy over speed (but still efficient)

- Calm and professional communication

- Strong ownership and responsibility

- Ability to work independently without micromanagement



Compensation

- First phase: $6 per hour

- When volume grows: Monthly ($300) or bi-weekly ($150) payment

- Winning disputes bonus structure

- Long-term collaboration for the right candidate



How to Apply (IMPORTANT)

Please include:

- Your experience with dropshipping support

- Your experience with PayPal disputes

- Tools you have worked with (Reamaze or similar tools, Shopify, Shopify tracking apps, Slack, Brandwise, Sheets, etc.)

Applications without relevant experience will not be considered.

title: Commercial Solar Admin (Australia)
description:
We are seeking an Australian Commercial Solar Admin Specialist with hands-on experience in Australian commercial solar projects (30 kW and above).



This role focuses on post-sale administration, approvals, compliance, and documentation for commercial solar and solar + battery projects. Once onboarded, you will be trusted to manage jobs independently within defined processes.



This role is not suitable for general VAs or candidates without direct Australian solar experience.



Key Responsibilities:



1. Commercial Solar Administration

- Manage DNSP grid connection applications for commercial solar systems (30 kW+)

- Prepare and submit pre-approval applications

- Respond to DNSP technical queries and requests for additional information

- Manage export limits, zero-export requirements, and protection conditions

- Upload and manage documentation across DNSP portals



2. Solar + Battery Projects

- Support commercial battery approvals and documentation

- Ensure batteries are included correctly in DNSP approvals and SLDs

- Manage commissioning evidence and compliance documentation

- Coordinate with installers to resolve approval or documentation gaps



3. Compliance & Documentation

Review and manage:

- Single Line Diagrams (SLDs)

- CEC-compliant documentation

- Installer and designer accreditation evidence

- Commissioning photos and reports

Prepare STC documentation for commercial systems

Package compliance folders for audit readiness



Coordination & Communication

Liaise with:

- Australian installers and electricians

- STC traders

- Retailers and DNSPs (via
 and portals)

Track job status, approvals, and outstanding actions

Flag risks, delays, or compliance issues early and escalate appropriately



Required Experience (Non-Negotiable)



Candidates must have:

- Direct experience working with Australian solar companies

- Experience supporting commercial solar systems (30 kW+)

- Hands-on experience with at least one of the following:

- Grid connection applications

- STCs for commercial solar

- Australian DNSP portals



A solid understanding of:

- Export limits and DNSP pre-approval requirements

- Solar + battery integration fundamentals

- Clean Energy Council (CEC) compliance frameworks



Essential:

Victorian solar experience, including exposure to Victorian DNSPs such as:

- Powercor

- AusNet

- Jemena

- United Energy

- Experience across multiple Australian states (VIC, NSW, QLD)

- Experience managing commercial metering coordination

- Familiarity with CRMs such as Pylon, OpenSolar, ServiceM8, or similar

- Experience supporting mid-to-high volume solar installers



*Candidates without Australian solar experience should not apply.*



Benefits

Why You’ll Love Working With Us

- AU time zone working hours (no graveyard shifts)

- We’re a passionate, forward-thinking team (and genuinely good humans)

- Growth opportunities as we expand

- Supportive culture where initiatives and ideas are celebrated



*Only applications submitted through the link will be considered. 

*Please do not apply if you don't have the qualifications, thank you!

description:

title: Ad Sales Lead Generation & Inbox Management (Part-time)
description:
The Role

You’ll own the day-to-day execution of our outbound ad sales pipeline. That means managing cold
 campaigns, sending Linkedin messages, handling the initial back-and-forth with prospects, keeping our CRM updated, and making sure nothing falls through the cracks. This is fairly low volume. 



You won’t be writing cold
 copy from scratch or making strategic decisions about who to target—you’ll be executing a system that’s already built, using tools and templates that are already in place.

This is a support role, not a sales role. You’re the engine that keeps the pipeline moving so the person closing deals can focus on conversations that matter.



What You’ll Do



Cold Outreach Campaign Management 

•  Pull leads from our lead generation software using filters and criteria we provide

•  Do light verification on contact data before loading into campaigns

•  Load contacts into Instantly sequences (copy is pre-written by us)

- Send 20-30 outreach messages on Linkedin per day 



Inbox Management & Lead Qualification

•  Monitor and respond to all inbound replies from cold
 campaigns

•  Handle routine replies: not interested, wrong contact, timing-based objections, basic questions

•  Follow provided response templates and a decision-tree guide for common reply types



Past Sponsor Outreach

•  Send targeted, individual
s to previous sponsors from a shared inbox 

•  Flag responses and escalate as needed



CRM & Pipeline Tracking 

•  Update lead statuses on our existing board (interested, negotiating, closed, etc.)

•  Keep the board clean and current—no stale leads, no missing updates



Light Admin Support

•  Schedule calls with sponsors and send calendar invites

•  Track upcoming ad placement dates so we can prepare copy in advance

•  Other small administrative tasks as they come up





Who You Are

Must-haves:

•  Strong written English—this is the #1 requirement. You’ll be the first point of contact for potential advertisers. Your
s need to read naturally and professionally, not like templates.

•  Reliable and detail-oriented. You update the CRM after every interaction, you don’t let
s sit unanswered, you flag issues before they become problems.

•  Comfortable working US hours. 

•  Able to follow SOPs and decision trees precisely while using good judgment on edge cases.

•  Responsive communicator—if something’s unclear, you ask rather than guess.



Nice-to-haves:

•  Experience with Instantly or similar cold
 platforms 

•  Familiarity with project management tools

•  Previous experience supporting a sales or business development function



Details

•  Hours: 15–20 per week

•  Schedule: 2 hours in morning, 2 hours in afternoon or evening. US hours. 

•  Tools: Instantly, 
, Google Workspace, shared
 inbox. Training provided on all tools.

title: Art Director
description:
Blunt Cases is a fast-growing fashion phone case brand creating bold, aesthetic phone cases for women who want to express themselves. Our mission is simple: help women feel confident, authentic, and unapologetically themselves.



We’re looking for an Art Director who can elevate the entire visual identity of the brand. This role is both strategic and hands-on. You”ll shape the creative vision, guide design execution, and lead a growing creative team.



If you’re obsessed with aesthetics, deeply comfortable using AI image and video generation tools, and love building beautiful visual systems across products, packaging, and campaigns, this role is for you.



?



What You’ll Do



Creative Direction

 • Define and evolve the visual identity of Blunt Cases

 • Create creative direction for product collections, campaigns, and launches

 • Develop mood boards, aesthetic references, and visual guidelines for designers

 • Ensure consistency across product design, ads, social media, and packaging



Product & Design Oversight

 • Guide the creation of new phone case designs and collections

 • Work closely with designers to refine and approve designs

 • Maintain a high aesthetic bar and ensure designs align with brand vision

 • Help identify trends in fashion, art, and culture that can inspire new designs



AI-Driven Design & Creative Tools

 • Use AI image generation tools to generate concepts, patterns, and visual ideas

 • Combine AI tools with Photoshop and traditional design tools to refine and finalize designs

 • Build efficient creative workflows that leverage AI for speed and experimentation



Branding & Packaging

 • Lead the design and development of product packaging

 • Maintain consistency across all branded touchpoints

 • Develop new brand assets, templates, and visual systems as the brand grows



Team Leadership

 • Manage and guide a team of designers and creative contributors

 • Provide clear creative direction and feedback

 • Ensure projects move efficiently from concept ? design ? production

 • Oversee multiple creative projects at once while maintaining quality



?



What We’re Looking For



You’re someone who:

 • Has strong visual taste and aesthetic instincts

 • Is extremely comfortable using AI image generation tools

 • Is highly skilled in Photoshop and modern design tools

 • Can think both creatively and strategically

 • Has experience managing designers and creative workflows

 • Is organized and comfortable managing multiple creative projects simultaneously

 • Understands trends in fashion, culture, and Gen Z aesthetics



?



Required Skills

 • Advanced Photoshop

 • Experience with AI image generation tools 

 • Strong creative direction and visual storytelling

 • Experience managing or directing a creative team in agency setting 

 • Strong portfolio demonstrating branding, design systems, or product design



?



Bonus Skills

 • Experience designing physical products or packaging

 • Experience with ecommerce brands

 • Experience with ad creative and social media visuals

 • Familiarity with AI-assisted design workflows



?



Why Work With Us

 • Help shape the creative direction of a growing lifestyle brand

 • Work with a team that values creativity, speed, and experimentation

 • Use cutting-edge AI tools to push creative boundaries

 • Have real impact on a brand seen by thousands of customers



To Apply:



1. Title your application: AD

2. Link your portfolio 

3. Why you think you’re a good fit

4. Your favorite Blunt Case

title: Shopify Store Operations VA for Luxury E-Commerce Brand
description:
We are hiring a reliable, detail-oriented VA to help improve and manage a luxury e-commerce store, 
.



This Phase 1 role is focused on:



Shopify store cleanup and organization



Fixing content and layout issues



Reviewing pages for errors or inconsistencies



Updating product, policy, navigation, and basic store content



Documenting changes clearly before and after work is done



You should be comfortable working inside Shopify, following instructions carefully, and making safe, organized updates without creating new problems.



This is not a “marketing guru” role. This is for someone professional, steady, detail-focused, and strong with Shopify admin tasks.



What I’m looking for



Strong Shopify experience



Very organized and careful



Good written English



Able to follow instructions exactly



Comfortable giving updates and documenting work



Honest about what you know and what needs approval first



Important



No random changes



No deleting pages, apps, or theme settings without approval



No code edits without approval



Must keep a clear log of what was reviewed, changed, and what still needs attention



Hours

Start at about 5 to 10 hours per week



Pay

$7 to $10/hour depending on experience and communication



Growth Opportunity

This role begins with core Shopify operations and site cleanup. If it’s a strong fit, there is room for this position to expand into ongoing support with supplier/distributor onboarding, admin support, and light marketing coordination.



To apply

Please reply with:



Your Shopify experience



Examples of store cleanup or admin work you’ve done



Your hourly rate



Shopify Store Operations Assistant for Premium E-Commerce Store



Job Post

I’m hiring a dependable, detail-oriented Shopify VA to help improve and maintain my premium e-commerce store, 
.



This Phase 1 role is focused on store operations and cleanup. I need someone who can go through the site carefully, spot issues, make safe updates, keep things organized, and help bring the store to a cleaner, more professional standard.



Main responsibilities



Review the Shopify store for content, layout, navigation, and consistency issues



Update store content, product details, collections, menus, and policy-related pages as instructed



Help clean up store presentation and organization inside Shopify



Flag issues clearly before making changes when approval is needed



Keep a simple work log of what was reviewed, changed, and still needs attention



This role is a fit if you are



Experienced with Shopify admin



Careful and methodical



Strong at following instructions



Good at written communication



Comfortable working independently inside a structured process



Professional, honest, and not careless with live stores



Important rules



Do not delete pages, apps, products, or settings without approval



Do not edit code unless specifically approved



Do not make broad design decisions on your own



Document your work clearly at the end of each session



Hours and pay



Start with 5–10 hours per week



Pay range: $7–$10/hour



Potential for longer-term work if it’s a strong fit



Growth opportunity

If Phase 1 goes well, this role may grow into a larger support position involving supplier/distributor onboarding, store support, and ongoing operations.



Application instructions

Put READY at the top of your application and answer these:



What Shopify tasks have you handled before?



Have you worked on store cleanup, product organization, or page corrections?



What is your hourly rate?



If you were asked to review a Shopify store for problems, how would you organize the work and report it back?

title: [Quick Placement] Reliable VA Receptionist Full Time Remote
description:
Important: Our application process moves quickly. If you are selected to proceed to the next interview stages, you must be able to respond promptly. Candidates who do not respond in a timely manner may be passed over.



We are currently seeking a Remote Spa Receptionist to manage inbound calls and book spa appointments. This is a long-term, performance-based position. Calls are recorded and reviewed regularly. Continued placement in this role depends on accuracy, professionalism, booking success, reliable attendance, no missed calls during scheduled shifts, quick response times, and the ability to professionally manage complaints and de-escalate dissatisfied clients.



To apply: Please copy the questions below, paste them into your reply, and answer each question thoroughly.



(1) Location & Utilities: Where in the Philippines are you currently located? How often have you experienced power or internet outages in the past year? Do you have backup solutions (e.g., generator, mobile hotspot) to ensure your work is not affected?



(2) Home Setup: Will you be working from home? Is your workspace quiet and suitable for handling calls? Do you have your own computer or laptop? Please attach a screenshot of your current internet speed.



(3) Availability & Speed: Can you consistently work seven days a week, six hours per day, and remain available for the full shift without missed calls? How quickly do you typically answer inbound calls? What is your current typing speed in words per minute?



(4) Call & Complaint Experience: Describe your experience with answering inbound calls, booking or scheduling appointments, customer service, following scripts, and handling complaints. Provide one real example of how you de-escalated an upset client and the outcome.



(5) Tools & Systems: What programs, tools, phone systems, or VoIP platforms have you used for handling calls? Do you have any issues with background noise, power outages, or internet interruptions? How do you take notes and log client interactions during calls?



(6) Voice Recordings: Please submit two short voice recordings. Recording one should demonstrate booking an appointment from 7:00 PM to 8:00 PM with a total amount of $60. Recording two should demonstrate handling a double charge for a 90-minute massage where the client sees two $90 charges and is requesting a refund. Your tone should be calm, polite, and professional.



(7) Current Job: Do you currently have another job? If yes, where, how many hours per week, and what are your roles and tasks in that job?



(8) Schedule, Pay & Start Date: Are you able to work seven days a week, six hours per day, during Central Standard Time (CST) hours without conflicts? What is your expected hourly or monthly rate? What is your earliest physical start date if hired?



(9) Marketing, Design & Video: Do you have experience with online marketing, creating content using Canva, or producing short video clips such as
 Reels or similar platforms? Please describe your skills and provide samples of your previous work if available.



(10) Fit, Skills & Experience: Briefly introduce yourself and explain why you would be a good fit for this role. Include what you believe is most important when handling spa clients over the phone, especially during complaints, and what other skills or areas you have a lot of experience in.

title: Experienced Funnel Builder – Funnelish (Dropshipping)
description:
We are a fast-growing e-commerce company with multiple stores in the health & beauty niche. We are looking for an experienced Funnel Builder who specializes in Funnelish and HTML5 to build, optimize, and scale high-converting funnels.

- Rebuild and adapt competitor funnels into our own branded versions

- Implement and customize HTML5 / CSS elements for layout, animations, and responsiveness

- Optimize funnels for mobile-first performance and fast loading

- Ensure correct tracking, links, and flow logic

- Apply feedback and iterate quickly on existing funnels



Requirements:

- Experience building advertorial-style funnels

Nice to Have:

Payment & Terms:

How to Apply

title: HR & Talent Operations Manager (Remote – Full Time)
description:
About TAG

The Allicock Group (TAG) is a growing workforce solutions company that provides staffing, recruiting, and professional development services to schools and organizations across the United States.

We specialize in placing high-quality professionals including teachers, therapists, counselors, and education specialists.

Our company is expanding and we are building a stronger HR and recruiting infrastructure to support our growth.

We are looking for a highly organized and proactive HR & Talent Operations Manager to oversee recruiting pipelines, onboarding processes, HR documentation, and operational workflows.

This role will replace multiple part-time support roles and will serve as the central coordinator for TAG’s HR and recruiting operations.



About the Role

This is not a basic admin job.

We are looking for someone who can take ownership of HR operations, manage recruiting workflows, and ensure that hiring and onboarding processes run smoothly.

You will work directly with company leadership and help build systems that support a growing staffing organization.

The ideal candidate is organized, proactive, comfortable managing multiple tasks, and able to solve problems independently.

Key Responsibilities



Recruitment & Candidate Pipeline

• Source candidates through job boards and professional networks

• Review resumes and screen candidates for qualifications

• Conduct initial candidate interviews

• Schedule final interviews with leadership

• Maintain organized candidate pipelines

• Track recruitment metrics and hiring progress



Hiring & Onboarding

• Send offer letters and contracts to new hires

• Coordinate onboarding documentation

• Ensure candidates complete required forms and credentials

• Provide onboarding instructions and first-day information

• Track onboarding progress for new staff



HR Administration

• Maintain employee and contractor files

• Organize HR documentation and compliance records

• Maintain HR policies and process documentation

• Assist leadership with HR reports and data tracking



Systems & Workflow Management

• Manage HR systems and recruitment tracking tools

• Maintain candidate databases

• Track hiring progress and staff documentation

• Help develop SOPs for HR processes



Communication

• Serve as the primary HR contact for candidates and staff

• Respond to HR and recruiting inquiries

• Maintain clear and professional communication with applicants and tea
mbers



Key Metrics for Success

• Qualified candidates sourced each month

• Speed of interview scheduling and hiring processes

• Accuracy of HR records and documentation

• Successful onboarding of new staff



Requirements



Experience

• 3+ years experience in HR, recruiting, or talent operations

• Experience managing recruiting pipelines

• Experience interviewing candidates



Skills

• Strong organizational skills

• Excellent written and verbal communication

• Ability to manage multiple priorities independently

• High attention to detail



Technical Skills

• Google Workspace

• HR or recruiting systems (ATS or HRIS)

• Job boards such as Indeed or LinkedIn



Preferred

• Experience working with U.S. companies

• Experience in staffing or recruiting agencies

• Experience managing remote teams



Work Style We Value

• Proactive problem solving

• High accountability

• Strong communication

• Ability to work independently

• Commitment to professional standards



Please submit a short video introduction explaining your HR or recruiting experience.
